service_tiers.title: Affiliate Marketing Setup
service_tiers.excerpt: Get your affiliate program launched on a proven network with tracking, creative, and everything you need to start driving sales through partners.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is a one-time setup package to get your affiliate program running. You’ll be set up on one affiliate network (like ShareASale, CJ, or LinkShare), with tracking installed on your shopping cart and basic creative ready for affiliates to use.

You get access to the BMG affiliate dashboard where you can see sales activity, approve new affiliates, and track performance. We handle the technical setup so you can focus on recruiting partners and growing sales.

Why Affiliate Marketing

Affiliate marketing is paying for results. You work with bloggers, content sites, coupon platforms, and influencers who promote your products. When they send a customer who buys, you pay them a commission. No sale, no payment.

It’s performance-based. The risk is lower than traditional advertising because you’re only paying out when revenue comes in.

How It Works

  1. We set you up on one affiliate network (ShareASale, CJ, LinkConnector, etc.).
  2. We create two text links based on your products and install tracking code on your checkout page.
  3. We write welcome and approval/decline messages for new affiliates.
  4. You approve or reject affiliate applications through your dashboard.
  5. Affiliates promote your products. When they drive a sale, the network tracks it and attributes commission.
  6. You validate sales at month-end and pay out commissions through the network.

You only pay affiliates for sales you’ve already collected payment on. You validate or cancel transactions before commissions go out.

What’s Included

  • Setup on one affiliate network
  • Integration of tracking code on your shopping cart
  • Two text links created based on your products
  • Welcome message for new affiliates
  • Approval and decline email templates
  • Access to your BMG affiliate dashboard
  • Email support

Networks We Work With

ShareASale, CJ (Commission Junction), LinkShare, LinkConnector, Pepperjam, Admitad, Clixgalore, Commission Factory. We’ll recommend the best fit based on your vertical and product type.

What Happens After Setup

Once the technical setup is done and your tracking code is live, your program is ready. You can start approving affiliates. They’ll use the links and creative we built to promote your products on their sites, blogs, and social channels.

The network handles tracking (via cookies), reporting, and commission payouts. You validate sales through the dashboard and only pay out on confirmed orders.

  4. You approve or reject affiliate applications through your dashboard.
  5. Affiliates promote your products. When they drive a sale, the network tracks it and attributes commission.
  6. You validate sales at month-end and pay out commissions through the network.

You only pay affiliates for sales you’ve already collected payment on. You validate or cancel transactions before commissions go out.

What’s Included

  • Setup on one affiliate network
  • Integration of tracking code on your shopping cart
  • Two text links created based on your products
  • Welcome message for new affiliates
  • Approval and decline email templates
  • Access to your BMG affiliate dashboard
  • Email support

Networks We Work With

ShareASale, CJ (Commission Junction), LinkShare, LinkConnector, Pepperjam, Admitad, Clixgalore, Commission Factory. We’ll recommend the best fit based on your vertical and product type.

What Happens After Setup

Once the technical setup is done and your tracking code is live, your program is ready. You can start approving affiliates. They’ll use the links and creative we built to promote your products on their sites, blogs, and social channels.

The network handles tracking (via cookies), reporting, and commission payouts. You validate sales through the dashboard and only pay out on confirmed orders.

service_tiers.content_raw:

The Power Plan is for businesses that want affiliate marketing handled without hiring a full team.

You work directly with me. Behind the scenes, a full team handles design, technical setup, publisher outreach, and weekly reporting.

What’s Included

  • Up to 3 affiliate networks: account setup and integration
  • 3 custom banners: static and animated formats (JPG, PNG, GIF, Flash)
  • 4 text links: product-specific and category-specific
  • 1 mobile banner: optimized for mobile placements
  • Tracking code integration: we install tracking on your shopping cart so every sale gets attributed correctly
  • Affiliate messaging: welcome messages, approval/decline templates, recruitment emails
  • Product feed upload: your catalog goes live on the network
  • Weekly publisher outreach: 50 new affiliates contacted every week, plus ongoing communication with active partners
  • Weekly and monthly reports: delivered through your dashboard
  • Email and phone support: direct access when you need it

Affiliate marketing is pay-for-performance. You only pay commissions when a sale happens. The risk is lower than most marketing channels.

Publishers (affiliates) promote your products on their sites, blogs, social feeds, or email lists. When someone buys through their link, they earn a commission. The network tracks everything. We manage the network accounts, recruit the publishers, create the assets they need, and keep the program running.

We’ve worked with affiliate networks like ShareASale, CJ, LinkConnector, Pepperjam, Admitad, and others. We know how to structure commissions, recruit the right affiliates, and avoid fraud.

What Makes This Different

  • Agency partner rates: you get discounted setup and monthly fees through the networks we work with
  • Real outreach: we contact 50 new affiliates every week, not just post your program and hope someone finds it
  • Fraud monitoring: instant alerts if something looks wrong
  • In-house design and dev: banners, tracking, technical fixes, all handled internally
  • Google Analytics integration: your dashboard pulls GA data so you see the full picture

You get a branded dashboard. Affiliates see your brand. The backend work happens behind the scenes.

service_tiers.title: Premium Affiliate Marketing Management
service_tiers.excerpt: Full-service affiliate program management for established businesses. I handle up to 5 affiliate networks, create banners and text links, recruit and manage 130+ publishers weekly, track performance, and send detailed reports. You focus on your business while I grow your affiliate channel.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is hands-on affiliate marketing management. I run your program day-to-day so you don’t have to.

You get tracking code integration on your shopping cart, fraud monitoring, banner and text link creation, publisher recruitment and communication, data feed uploads, newsletter design and distribution, and detailed weekly and monthly performance reports. Everything happens in your dashboard. You see every task completed, every affiliate recruited, every sale tracked.

How It Works

Affiliate marketing is performance-based. You only pay commissions on actual sales or leads. I manage the relationships with publishers (affiliates) who promote your products on their blogs, coupon sites, content sites, and social feeds. When they drive a sale, they earn a commission. The affiliate network tracks it all with cookies, validates the transaction, and pays out automatically.

My job: recruit the right affiliates, give them the creative assets they need (banners, links, coupon codes), communicate with them regularly, monitor for fraud, and report back to you on what’s working.

What’s Included

  • Dashboard Access: Your own branded dashboard to view campaign performance, affiliate activity, and task completion in real time.
  • Network Setup: I connect up to 5 affiliate networks (ShareASale, CJ, Linkshare, Admitad, Pepperjam, etc.) to your dashboard.
  • Creative Assets: 5 new banners (JPG, PNG, GIF), 6 text links, 3 mobile banners, 2 dynamic (Flash) banner ads. Affiliates need variety to promote you effectively.
  • Publisher Recruitment: I send invite emails to 130 new affiliates per week and communicate with active affiliates to keep them engaged.
  • Tracking & Fraud Monitoring: Tracking code integration on your shopping cart, fraud click and sale tracking, instant alerts on suspicious activity.
  • Communication & Support: Personalized welcome and approval messages for new affiliates, recruitment emails, newsletters to your publisher base.
  • Data & Widget Management: I upload product data feeds to your network accounts and create/upload widgets as needed.
  • Consultation: Guidance on coupon code strategy, commission structure, cookie duration, and competitive positioning.
  • Reporting: Detailed weekly and monthly performance reports (top affiliates, top banners, sales stats, management activity).
  • Support: Email and phone support. You work with me. Behind me is a team that handles execution at scale.

Who This Is For

Businesses with established products and the infrastructure to handle affiliate-driven sales volume. You need a shopping cart, you need conversion tracking, and you need margin to pay commissions. If you’re just starting out, this might be too much firepower. If you’re already doing $50K+/month and want to add a new sales channel without hiring in-house, this is the move.

Why Affiliates Matter

You’re paying for results only. No sale, no commission. That’s the whole point. Affiliates take the risk of promoting you. You take the risk of fulfilling orders. The network sits in the middle and makes sure everyone gets paid fairly.

Good affiliates have audiences you can’t reach on your own. Coupon sites, deal blogs, niche content creators, influencer networks. They send traffic. You convert it. They get a cut. Everyone wins.

Bad affiliate programs die from neglect. No banners, no communication, no recruiting, commissions too low, cookie duration too short. Affiliates move on. I handle the maintenance so your program stays competitive.

service_tiers.title: Professional Affiliate Marketing Management
service_tiers.excerpt: Get your affiliate program running with 4 affiliate networks, custom banners and text links, fraud monitoring, and weekly publisher recruiting. We handle setup, tracking, and ongoing management so you can focus on running your business.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You’re Getting

This is for businesses ready to build real revenue through affiliate marketing. You work directly with me. Behind me is a team that handles the execution, banner design, network setup, publisher outreach, fraud monitoring, all of it.

You get: - 4 affiliate networks set up and managed (ShareASale, CJ, Linkshare, others) - Custom creative assets: 4 banners (JPG/PNG/GIF), 5 text links, 2 mobile banners, 2 Flash ads - Tracking code integration on your shopping cart so every sale gets attributed correctly - Fraud monitoring:we watch for junk clicks and fake sales - Weekly publisher recruiting: we reach out to 100+ new affiliates per week, plus ongoing communication with active partners - Branded dashboard where you see everything: affiliate performance, top banners, sales reports, the works

How It Works

Affiliate marketing is paying people to send you customers. You only pay when they deliver results, a sale, a lead, whatever you define. The affiliates (bloggers, coupon sites, influencers, loyalty programs) promote your products. When someone buys through their link, they get a commission.

The affiliate networks (like ShareASale or CJ) are the middleman. They handle tracking, payouts, and creative hosting. We manage your presence on those networks. We recruit the affiliates, approve the good ones, decline the junk, and keep your program visible.

You validate the sales at the end of each month. You only pay commissions on orders you’ve actually collected money for. If an order gets canceled or refunded, you mark it as such and the affiliate doesn’t get paid. Simple.

What Makes This Work

Tracking is everything. We install a tracking script on your checkout page. It captures the order ID and amount. The network uses cookies to tie the sale back to the affiliate who sent the traffic. Cookie duration matters, longer is better for affiliates. If you set a 30-day cookie and someone clicks an affiliate link today but doesn’t buy until next week, that sale still counts. We’ll help you set terms that attract affiliates without killing your margins.

Creative assets matter. Affiliates need banners, text links, mobile ads, stuff they can actually use. We create those for you. We refresh them regularly. The more options they have, the more they’ll promote you.

Publisher relationships matter. We recruit new affiliates every week and stay in touch with the active ones. We send newsletters, share performance stats, and give feedback to your top performers. The better we treat them, the harder they work for you.

Fraud monitoring matters. Fake clicks and fraudulent sales are real problems. We watch for them and alert you immediately.

The Dashboard

You get a branded dashboard (looks like ours, not the network’s). It shows: - Top 5 affiliate performance stats - Top banner performance stats - Weekly management reports - Monthly sales performance reports - Google Analytics integration

Everything we do gets logged there. You can check in anytime and see exactly what’s happening with your program.

service_tiers.title: 12 Fold Brochure Design
service_tiers.excerpt: A custom 12-fold brochure that looks like your brand and says what you need it to say. One design, done right.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

A professional 12-fold brochure designed to match your brand. You send me your logo, colors, and content. I handle the layout, formatting, and final files.

This is a one-time design project. You get print-ready files formatted to industry-standard dimensions. The design works on screens too, so you can use it digitally if you want.

What’s Included

  • Custom layout using your branding (logo, fonts, colors)
  • Industry-standard dimensions for printing
  • Responsive design that works on any screen size
  • Final files delivered in formats you can use

You’re buying the design work. If you need revisions or want to print it, that’s separate. This gets you the files.

service_tiers.title: Affiliate Banner Design
service_tiers.excerpt: Custom banner ads for your affiliate campaigns. Static images or HTML5 animations that work across any platform.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

I design banner ads for affiliate campaigns. You get designs that match your brand, your colors, your fonts, your logo. All sized correctly for standard ad placements.

Two format options: static image banners or HTML5 (animated, interactive). Both are fully responsive. They’ll look right on desktop, mobile, tablet.

Why This Matters

Affiliate networks have specific size requirements. Standard placements like 728×90, 300×250, 160×600. Get the dimensions wrong and your ad gets rejected or looks broken. I handle that.

You also need consistency. If every banner looks different, nobody recognizes your brand. I build a template system so all your ads feel cohesive, same visual language, different messages.

The Build Process

You send me your brand assets (logo, colors, any fonts you want to use). I design a banner set that fits standard IAB dimensions. You review, request changes if needed. Once approved, you get files ready to upload to your affiliate platform.

HTML5 banners are built to spec, lightweight code, fast load times, work in all major ad servers. Static banners are high-resolution PNGs or JPGs, optimized for file size without losing quality.

What’s Included

  • Custom design using your branding
  • Standard IAB dimensions (you tell me which sizes you need)
  • Fully responsive (adapts to screen size)
  • Static or HTML5 format
  • Source files delivered

This is a one-time design project. You own the files. Use them in as many campaigns as you want.

No trial-and-error on image sizing. No generic stock photos. Just a clean banner that fits.

service_tiers.title: Custom Character Animation Video Creation
service_tiers.excerpt: We create a custom animated video for your business, script, voiceover, stock footage, and flash character animation. One video, ready to run across YouTube and your website.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

A 60-90 second animated video built around your business. We write the script (intro to your business + call to action), record a professional U.S.-based male voiceover, and combine stock footage with custom flash character animation.

Why Video Works

People trust what they can see. A video on your homepage or YouTube channel does three things fast: it shows what you do, it keeps people on your site longer, and it gives them a reason to call.

You’re not buying airtime on local TV. You’re not printing a Yellow Pages spread. You’re putting a video asset online that works 24/7.

Stock Footage + Animation

Stock footage keeps the cost reasonable and the timeline short. We pull clips that match your industry, layer in the animation, and sync everything to the voiceover. The result looks professional without the overhead of a full shoot.

What Happens After Delivery

You get the video file. You can upload it to YouTube, embed it on your site, run it as a Facebook ad, or send it in an email campaign. It’s yours to use however you need.

service_tiers.title: Custom WordPress Landing Page
service_tiers.excerpt: A professionally built, mobile-friendly landing page that gets your business online fast. Built on WordPress, optimized for conversions, delivered in two weeks.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

A single-page WordPress landing page that represents your business, showcases your services, and captures leads. This isn’t a DIY template you fill out yourself, we build it for you, wire it up, and hand it over ready to run.

The page includes:

  • Custom WordPress template (one page, no navigation)
  • Up to 5 contact form fields
  • Business contact details
  • Call-to-action button
  • Licensed royalty-free images
  • Mobile-friendly, responsive design
  • 1 text revision + 1 image swap after delivery

Turnaround: up to 2 weeks from the time you provide everything we need (intake form, logo, content, hosting access).

How It Works

1. Client intake and branding

You fill out the intake form. We gather your logo, brand colors, fonts, and any images you want to use. If you don’t have images, we pull from licensed stock libraries.

2. Content integration

We build the page layout and drop in your content, services, contact info, call-to-action, etc.

3. First revision

We send you a staging link. You review and provide feedback on:

  • Section layout (remove anything unnecessary)
  • Color scheme
  • Fonts

This is where you confirm the branding is right and the structure makes sense.

4. Second revision

We make adjustments based on your feedback:

  • Image swaps
  • Content tweaks
  • Banner elements (no full redesigns)
  • Social media links

5. Pre-launch QA

Our team checks the page on multiple devices and browsers. We verify mobile responsiveness, form functionality, and load speed.

6. Migration

We move the page to your hosting provider. You’ll need to give us access credentials (FTP or cPanel).

7. Post-launch QA and handover

We run through the live page one more time to confirm everything works. Then it’s yours.

What We Need From You

  • Completed intake form
  • Logo and brand assets
  • Written content for the page (or approval to write it for you)
  • Image selections (or approval to use stock images)
  • Hosting access credentials

The faster you provide these, the faster we deliver.

Timeline

Once we have everything listed above, expect 3, 5 business days for the initial build, then two revision rounds (24, 48 hours each). Total turnaround is typically under 2 weeks.

We don’t launch on Fridays. If something breaks over the weekend, neither of us is around to fix it.

We don’t launch on Fridays. If something breaks over the weekend, neither of us is around to fix it.

service_tiers.title: Facebook Post Images
service_tiers.excerpt: Custom images for your Facebook posts that get people to stop scrolling and engage with your business.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

One custom image designed for a Facebook post. Use it to announce a promotion, highlight a service, share a customer win, or just keep your feed active.

These aren’t stock photos with your logo slapped on. Each image is built to fit your brand and the specific message you’re posting. The goal is simple: make people stop, look, and engage.

Why It Works

Facebook prioritizes posts with visual content. A good image gets more reach than text alone. More reach means more likes, comments, shares, and clicks back to your website or storefront.

You tell me what the post is about. I handle the design. You get a ready-to-use image file that you can upload directly to Facebook.

What’s Included

  • One custom image, sized for Facebook feed posts
  • Design matches your brand colors and style
  • Delivered as a high-resolution file ready to upload
  • Turnaround within 3 business days

This is a one-time deliverable. If you need ongoing images for regular posting, consider the Social Media Content or Social Media Management services instead.

This is a one-time design project. You get the source files and finals. If you need revisions after delivery, we can talk about a follow-up.

  • Handouts or mailers

service_tiers.title: Google Banner Ads Design
service_tiers.excerpt: Custom banner ads for Google Display campaigns. Static or HTML5, built to your brand, sized correctly, fully responsive.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

I design banner ads that fit Google’s Display network specs exactly. No guessing on dimensions, no compatibility issues. You get clean designs that work with your brand and load correctly on any device.

Custom Design

Your logo, your colors, your fonts. The banners should look like they’re from you, not a template factory. I build each set to match your existing brand or help establish one if you’re starting fresh.

Correct Sizing

Google’s ad placements require specific dimensions. I format every banner to those standards so they display properly across the network. No cropping, no stretching, no rejected uploads.

Fully Responsive

HTML5 banners scale and adapt to different screen sizes. Desktop, mobile, tablet - they render correctly everywhere. Static designs are optimized for their target placements.

This is a one-time design service. You get the final files to use in your Google Ads campaigns. If you need revisions or new sets later, we handle those as separate orders.

service_tiers.title: Infographic Creation
service_tiers.excerpt: Turn your data into something people actually want to share. An infographic takes dense information and makes it visual, memorable, and spreadable.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

An infographic is a long-form graphic that turns your data into a visual story. Instead of a wall of text or a boring spreadsheet, you get something people can scan in seconds and understand immediately.

This works if you have data worth showing off. Customer stats, process breakdowns, research findings, industry comparisons. Anything that’s currently trapped in a PDF or a blog post no one reads.

Why This Matters

A good infographic does four things:

  • Gets shared. People link to infographics. Other sites embed them. That means backlinks you didn’t have to pitch for.
  • Drives traffic. Every site that shares your infographic sends visitors back to you.
  • Builds authority. When your brand is attached to a well-researched visual, people remember it. You become the source.
  • Improves rankings. Those backlinks from shares? They count. They help your site rank higher.

The infographic itself is branded to you. It lives on your site. You own it.

The Process

Step 1: Strategy: I look at your campaign goals and your market. We figure out what story the data should tell and who needs to see it.

Step 2: Research: My team verifies every data point. We compare sources, check accuracy, and make sure the facts hold up.

Step 3: Design: Our designers turn the research into a polished, professional infographic. Clean layout, on-brand colors, easy to read.

Step 4: Promotion (optional): If you want, we pitch the infographic to media sharing networks, blogs, and industry sites. That’s where the backlinks and traffic come from.

You get the final file in formats you can use: web-ready PNG, embeddable code, and a high-res PDF if you want to print it.

service_tiers.title: Magento Ecommerce Website
service_tiers.excerpt: A custom Magento store built for your business. Open source, fully responsive, optimized for mobile, tablet, and desktop.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You’re Getting

A custom Magento ecommerce site. Not a template. Built from scratch for your brand.

Magento is an open source platform that gives you full control over your store. We design and build a responsive site that works on every device. Mobile, tablet, desktop. Your customers get a clean shopping experience no matter where they land.

Why Magento

Flexibility. You’re not locked into a hosted platform’s rules. You own the code. You can customize checkout flows, product pages, shipping logic, whatever your business needs.

Scalability. Whether you’re launching with 50 products or 5,000, the platform grows with you.

The Process

We start with your brand. Logo, colors, style references. Then we design a homepage mockup. You review, request changes, we refine. Once you approve the design, we move into development. We build out the full site, test everything, then launch.

You get 30 days of support after launch. After that, you can add hosting or maintenance separately if you need it.

What We Need From You

  • A description of your business and what you sell
  • Domain name and hosting details (or we can recommend providers)
  • Content: product descriptions, images, policies
  • Branding assets: logo, fonts, colors
  • Color preferences and style direction
  • 3 example sites you like (helps us understand your taste)
  • Any special functionality you need (subscription billing, custom shipping rules, etc.)

Timeline

Most projects take 2-3 weeks depending on complexity and how many revision rounds you need. If you have a hard deadline, let me know upfront and we’ll see what we can do.

Tech Stack

Magento 2 core platform. HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, PHP. Everything is hand-coded. No drag-and-drop builders, no templates. If you want to manage content yourself after launch, we can integrate a CMS layer, but the storefront itself is custom-built.

service_tiers.title: Music Video Creation
service_tiers.excerpt: A short promotional video built from royalty-free footage and music, optimized for YouTube and social. Get your message in front of local customers without the hassle of a full production shoot.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

I create a short promotional video for your business using professional royalty-free footage and music. No on-site filming, no crew logistics, just a polished video ready to post on YouTube, your website, and social channels.

Why Video?

People watch. A well-placed video on your Google Business Profile or Facebook page builds trust faster than text alone. Potential customers see your message, hear your value prop, and decide whether to call, all before they pick up the phone.

The Process

You send me your business details, key selling points, and any brand assets (logo, colors, tagline). I pull together footage that fits your industry, add music, and deliver a finished video. You own it. Post it wherever you want.

Distribution

I deliver the file. You upload to YouTube, embed on your site, or share on Facebook/Instagram. If you want help optimizing the YouTube listing (title, description, tags), let me know and we can fold that in.

This is a one-time deliverable. No monthly fees. You get the video, you keep it forever.

service_tiers.title: Ready Character Animation Video Creation
service_tiers.excerpt: Online video is how people find businesses now. We create a professional animated explainer video using stock footage, voiceover, and character animation, an affordable way to introduce your business and drive action.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You’re Getting

A 60-90 second animated video built to introduce your business and make the call to action clear. We use stock footage (professional B-roll), professional voiceover (US-based male talent), and character animation to give the video motion and personality.

This is not a Hollywood production. It’s a clean, effective business video designed to run on your website, YouTube, and social platforms. The kind of video that lets people understand what you do before they call.

How It Works

  1. You tell me what the business does and what action you want people to take (call, visit, book, etc.).
  2. I write the script, intro to your business, value prop, and a clear call to action.
  3. The team assembles the video: stock footage, voiceover recording, character animation overlays.
  4. You review, we revise once if needed, and deliver the final file.

Why Stock Footage

Stock footage is the reason this is affordable. We’re not scheduling a film crew. We’re pulling high-quality B-roll from licensed libraries and cutting it to match your script. It looks professional because it IS professional footage, just not shot custom for you.

The character animation gives it a branded layer. It’s not just stock clips stitched together.

What It’s Good For

  • Homepage hero video (“Here’s what we do in 60 seconds”)
  • YouTube intro for your channel
  • Facebook/Instagram ad creative
  • Email campaign asset
  • Trade show display loop

This is an intro video. It won’t close a complex sale on its own, but it gets people in the door.

service_tiers.title: Ready Templates Landing Page
service_tiers.excerpt: A professional 1-page landing page built on WordPress, delivered in 3-5 days. Get your business online with a clean template that converts visitors into leads.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You’re Getting

A single-page landing page built on a WordPress template. No complicated navigation, no multi-page site. Just one focused page designed to turn visitors into customers.

I handle the design, you provide the content and branding. Turnaround is 3-5 business days once I have everything I need.

What’s Included

  • 1-page WordPress template (no navigation)
  • 3-5 day turnaround
  • Licensed royalty-free images
  • Contact form (up to 5 fields)
  • Your business contact details and branding
  • Clear call-to-action
  • 1 text revision and 1 image swap after delivery

How It Works

Intake and Branding
You fill out the intake form. I gather your logo, colors, fonts, and images. We brand the template to match your business.

Content Integration
I plug your approved content into the template layout.

1st Revision Cycle
You get a staging link. Review it. First-round feedback focuses on: - Section removals - Color scheme - Fonts

This is where we make sure the structure and branding are right.

2nd Revision Cycle
Second round focuses on: - Image swaps - Content tweaks - Banner elements (not full redesign) - Social media links

Pre-Launch QA
My team runs quality checks. Mobile-friendly, responsive across devices and browsers.

Migration
We move the page to your hosting. You provide access credentials, we handle the rest.

Post-Launch QA and Handover
Final check to make sure everything works. Then it’s live.

What I Need From You

  • Completed intake form
  • Template selection, colors, typography approved
  • All content and existing assets
  • Selected and approved images
  • Logo and branding files

The faster you get me these, the faster you’re live.

Tech Stack

WordPress templates built with HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and PHP.

What You Get

This is a functional Shopify storefront, 10 pages, built on a template you choose from Shopify’s library. It’s responsive, optimized for search, and includes everything you need to start taking orders: payment gateway, shipping integration, product uploads, and analytics.

I handle the setup and customization. You pick the template, provide your content and branding, and I build it out. The site goes live in 2-3 weeks, depending on how fast we can turn around feedback and content at each stage.

What’s Included

  • 10 pages (home, product pages, contact, etc.)
  • Up to 25 products uploaded
  • Template-based design (customization within template limits)
  • 1 contact form using Shopify’s built-in module
  • Up to 8 professional stock photos from 123rf.com
  • Mobile-responsive across all pages
  • SEO-friendly structure
  • Google Analytics integration
  • Payment gateway integration
  • Shipping integration
  • Up to 2 design revisions
  • Technical support by phone, email, and chat during the build

How It Works

Kick-Off (What I Need From You)

Once you’re ready to start, I’ll need:

  • A brief description of your business and what you want the site to accomplish
  • A sitemap (the 10 pages you want built)
  • Your logo files and any brand guidelines
  • Content for each page (or we can write it for you at $31/page, up to 250 words)
  • A few reference sites you like
  • Your selected Shopify template (you’ll need to narrow this down from Shopify’s library)
  • Admin login to your Shopify dashboard (you’ll need to sign up for a Shopify plan first)

Design & Development

I start with the homepage. That takes about 4 business days. Once you approve it, I move to the inner pages. If all content and feedback come in on time, the full site is done in about 2 weeks.

Testing

Before going live, I test the site across devices and browsers. This takes up to 4 business days. After the site is published, I run a final round of testing and hand it off to you.

Timeline

2-3 weeks from start to finish, assuming timely feedback and content delivery. Delays on your end will push the timeline back.

Template Limitations

This is a template-based build. Shopify templates have built-in constraints, I can modify them, but only within what the template allows. If you need something custom that the template doesn’t support, we’ll need to scope that separately.

Add-Ons & Extras

  • Additional stock images: $10/image
  • Content writing: $31/page (up to 250 words)
  • Additional pages beyond 10: $20/page
  • Additional contact forms: $25 each
  • Any required Shopify apps or add-ons are your responsibility to purchase

What You’re Responsible For

  • Signing up for a Shopify plan and providing admin access
  • Selecting your template from Shopify’s library
  • Providing all content, logos, and branding materials
  • Purchasing any third-party apps or add-ons the site requires
  • Timely feedback at each milestone

If there are delays in getting me what I need, the project timeline extends accordingly.

service_tiers.title: Shopify Website Design
service_tiers.excerpt: A clean, modern Shopify store built for your business. Responsive, optimized for all devices, and ready to sell in 2-3 weeks.
service_tiers.content_raw:
Get your business online with a custom Shopify store

You need a site that works on every device, looks sharp, and doesn’t take months to build. That’s what this is.

I build Shopify stores from scratch. No templates. Everything is custom, layout, colors, fonts, image style. You tell me what you need, I design it, and we launch in 2-3 weeks.

What you get

  • Fully responsive design. Looks right on desktop, tablet, phone.
  • Custom build. No template. Every page designed for your business.
  • Optimized for all devices. Fast load times, clean code.
  • 30 days post-launch support. If something breaks or you have questions after we go live, I’m here.

What I need from you

Before we start, I’ll need:

  • A description of your business and what you’re selling
  • Your domain name and hosting details (or I can help you set those up)
  • Content, product descriptions, photos, logo, any branding assets you have
  • Color preferences and style direction (or just send me 3 sites you like)
  • Any special functionality you need (integrations, custom checkout, etc.)

If you don’t have all your content ready, that’s fine. We can start with placeholders and swap in the real stuff as you finish it.

The process

  1. Planning. We talk through your products, audience, and what you want the site to do. I build an outline.
  2. Mockup design. I design the homepage, layout, colors, fonts, image style. You review it.
  3. Revision. You tell me what to change. We dial it in.
  4. Development. Once you approve the design, I build the rest of the site.
  5. Testing. I test everything, checkout, mobile, forms, speed.
  6. Launch. You give final approval, we flip it live.

Usually takes 2-3 weeks depending on how complex the design is and how many revisions you need.

Hosting

This package covers design and build. Hosting is separate (Shopify handles that, and they charge monthly). I’ll walk you through the setup.

Support

After launch, you get 30 days of support via email. If something breaks or you need help tweaking something, I’m available. Response time is usually 24 hours or less during business hours.

service_tiers.title: Six Fold Brochure Design
service_tiers.excerpt: A six-fold brochure that looks like your business, not a template. I'll design it so it actually gets read.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You’re Getting

A custom six-fold brochure designed to match your brand. Not a template you fill in yourself. A real design that uses your logo, your colors, your fonts, and your message.

This is for businesses that need printed marketing materials that don’t look cheap. Trade shows, mailers, counter displays, whatever. The brochure works on screen too (PDF, email), fully responsive so it looks right on phones and desktops.

How It Works

You send me your content, logo, and any brand guidelines you have. I design the brochure, you review it, we make adjustments. Final file delivered in print-ready format (industry-standard dimensions) and digital formats.

One project, one price. No monthly fees.

service_tiers.title: Squarespace Website Setup
service_tiers.excerpt: A clean, mobile-friendly 5-page website built on Squarespace. You pick the template, I handle the setup and launch.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is a straightforward Squarespace site build. Five pages, template-based, optimized for mobile and search engines. You provide the content (or hire me to write it), pick a theme from Squarespace’s library, and I take it from there.

Deliverables:

  • 5 informational pages (homepage + 4 inner pages)
  • Template/theme-based design (you select from Squarespace 7.1)
  • Up to 2 rounds of revisions
  • Up to 8 professional stock photos (sourced from 123rf.com)
  • SEO-friendly structure
  • Mobile-responsive pages
  • Google Analytics integration
  • 2-3 week turnaround from kickoff to launch

Not Included:

  • eCommerce functionality
  • Content writing (available as add-on at $31/page for up to 250 words)
  • Additional pages beyond the initial 5 ($20/page)
  • Additional contact forms beyond 1 ($25 each)
  • Extra stock images beyond 8 ($10/image)

How It Works

Step 1: Kickoff

Once you approve the quote and process payment, we start. I’ll need:

  • Brief description of your business and what you want the site to accomplish
  • Sitemap (5 pages, what goes where)
  • Logo files and any brand guidelines
  • Written content for all pages (or let me know if you want me to write it)
  • 2-3 reference sites you like
  • Your selected Squarespace theme (pick one from their 7.1 templates)
  • Login credentials to your Squarespace dashboard (you’ll need an active Squarespace plan)

Step 2: Design & Development

  • I build the homepage first (takes about 4 business days)
  • Then the inner pages (roughly 2 weeks total if I have everything I need)

Step 3: Testing

  • Before launch: I test the site internally (up to 4 business days)
  • After launch: I test again live, then hand it off to you

Total timeline: 2-3 weeks from kickoff to launch, assuming no delays on content or feedback.

Important Notes

  • The site is built on a Squarespace template you choose. Customization is limited to what the template allows.
  • Stock images come from 123rf.com. If you need more than 8, it’s $10/image.
  • Pricing is based on the scope outlined here. Changes or additions will require a separate estimate.
  • Delays in providing content, feedback, or login access will push back the timeline.
  • You must have an active Squarespace account (version 7.1) and provide login access.

service_tiers.title: Tri-Fold Brochure Design
service_tiers.excerpt: A custom tri-fold brochure that fits your brand and gets your message across. Clean, professional, ready to print or share digitally.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

A professional tri-fold brochure designed around your brand. You send us your content, logo, and any style preferences. We build a clean, cohesive design that works in print or on screen.

How It Works

We match your existing brand identity. Fonts, colors, logo placement. The final file is formatted to industry-standard dimensions so any print shop can run it without reformatting.

You get a fully responsive digital version too. Looks sharp on desktop, tablet, phone. Use it as a PDF on your site or email it to prospects.

What Makes It Work

  • Brand Consistency: We build around your logo, colors, and existing materials. The brochure looks like it came from you, not a template library.
  • Print-Ready Specs: Correct dimensions, bleed lines, resolution. Hand it to any printer and they’ll run it.
  • Digital-Friendly: The same design works on screen. Responsive layout means it’s readable on any device.

This is a one-time deliverable. You get the source files and can reprint or redistribute as needed.

service_tiers.title: Twitter Header and Profile Photo Design
service_tiers.excerpt: Get a Twitter header and profile photo that fits your brand. Custom design that looks sharp and matches your style.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

I’ll design a Twitter header and profile photo that matches your brand. Custom layouts, exact dimensions, ready to upload.

You send me your logo (if you have one), tell me your color preferences, and I’ll create something that works. If you need adjustments, we’ll dial it in until it’s right.

Why This Matters

Your Twitter profile is the first thing people see. A sharp header and profile photo signal that you’re serious about your business.

I use the exact dimensions Twitter requires, so there’s no awkward cropping or pixelation. Upload it and it looks exactly how it should.

How It Works

  1. You give me the details - logo files, color codes, any specific imagery you want
  2. I create the header and profile photo
  3. You review, request changes if needed
  4. I deliver final files ready to upload

You own the files. Use them as long as you want.

service_tiers.title: Voiceover Video Creation
service_tiers.excerpt: Stock footage + professional voiceover = a video that introduces your business and drives action. One video, one price, delivered in days.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is straightforward: I write a script, pull stock footage, add professional voiceover (male, US-based), and deliver a finished video.

The script covers what your business does and includes a clear call to action. Could be an offer, a phone number, a website visit, whatever makes sense for you.

Stock footage keeps costs down and turnaround fast. You’re not paying for a film crew or custom shoots. The video still looks professional, just built from proven assets.

Why Video

People watch videos. They’ll sit through 60 seconds of video before they read 300 words of text. Video can run on your homepage, in an email, on YouTube, on Facebook. It works everywhere.

You’re also building trust. Someone sees your video, hears a voice explaining what you do, and they start to feel like they know you. That’s the point.

Distribution

Once the video is done, you can post it yourself or we can talk about YouTube optimization separately. This service is the video creation, script, footage, voiceover, editing. Distribution is its own conversation.

Delivery

You get the finished video file. MP4, ready to upload wherever you need it. Typical turnaround is about a week once we agree on the script direction.

service_tiers.title: Wix Website, 5 Pages
service_tiers.excerpt: A clean, responsive Wix site built from a template you choose. Five pages, mobile-friendly, SEO-ready. Up and running in 2-3 weeks.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is a straightforward Wix build. You pick the template, I handle the rest. Five pages, responsive design, Google Analytics hooked up, SEO structure in place. It’s not custom code, it’s template-based. That keeps the price reasonable and the timeline short.

What’s Included

  • 5 informational pages (Home, About, Services, Contact, etc.)
  • Template-based design: you choose the Wix template, I customize it within Wix’s constraints
  • Up to 2 rounds of revisions on the homepage and inner pages
  • Up to 8 professional stock photos from 123rf.com (additional images $10 each)
  • Mobile-friendly, responsive layout
  • SEO-friendly structure: clean URLs, meta tags, heading hierarchy
  • Google Analytics integration
  • 1 contact form using Wix’s built-in form module
  • 2-3 week turnaround from kickoff to live site

What’s Not Included

  • eCommerce functionality (product pages, cart, checkout)
  • Content writing (available as an add-on: $31 per page, up to 250 words)
  • Additional pages beyond 5 ($20 per page)
  • Additional contact forms ($25 each)
  • Custom coding outside Wix’s template system

How It Works

Kickoff / Intake

You provide:

  • Brief description of what you need and what you expect
  • Sitemap (names of the 5 pages)
  • Logo files and brand guidelines (colors, fonts, style)
  • Content for each page (or we can write it for an additional fee)
  • 2-3 reference sites you like
  • The Wix template you’ve chosen (I can help narrow this down if needed)
  • Login credentials to your Wix account (you’ll need an active Wix plan)

Design & Development

  • I build the homepage first. Takes about 4 business days. You review and provide feedback.
  • After homepage approval, I build the inner pages. Takes about 2 weeks if all content and assets are ready.

Testing & Handoff

  • Before going live: I test the site on desktop and mobile, check forms, analytics, and SEO setup. Takes up to 4 business days.
  • After going live: Final round of testing, then I hand off the site to you.

Total timeline: 2-3 weeks, assuming no delays on your end.

Important Notes

  • Template limitations. The site is built on the Wix template you choose. Customization is limited by what Wix allows. Some changes just aren’t possible without breaking the template.
  • Stock photos. Up to 8 images from 123rf.com are included. Additional images are $10 each.
  • Content is on you. If you don’t have content ready, I can write it for $31 per page (up to 250 words).
  • Delays. If you’re slow to provide feedback, content, or assets, the timeline stretches. The 2-3 week estimate assumes prompt turnaround on your end.
  • You own the Wix account. You’ll need an active Wix plan and you’ll provide login access so I can build the site in your account.

Important Notes

  • Template limitations. The site is built on the Wix template you choose. Customization is limited by what Wix allows. Some changes just aren’t possible without breaking the template.
  • Stock photos. Up to 8 images from 123rf.com are included. Additional images are $10 each.
  • Content is on you. If you don’t have content ready, I can write it for $31 per page (up to 250 words).
  • Delays. If you’re slow to provide feedback, content, or assets, the timeline stretches. The 2-3 week estimate assumes prompt turnaround on your end.
  • You own the Wix account. You’ll need an active Wix plan and you’ll provide login access so I can build the site in your account.

service_tiers.title: WooCommerce
service_tiers.excerpt: Sell online with a fully customizable, open-source ecommerce platform built for WordPress. A WooCommerce website gives you a simple, intuitive way to showcase your products with a modern, responsive design that works on every device.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You’re Getting

WooCommerce is the go-to ecommerce platform for WordPress. It’s open-source, which means total control over your store. No platform fees eating into your margins. No lock-in.

I build these sites custom. No templates. You get a modern, responsive design that works across all devices - desktop, tablet, phone. The customer experience is clean and fast.

This is for businesses that need a real online store. Product pages, checkout, inventory management, shipping integrations. All of it.

You own the site. You control the data. We build it, launch it, and hand you the keys.

What I Need From You

  • A description of your business.
  • What’s the purpose of the website? What are you selling?
  • Domain name, hosting details (if you have them), content, branding (logo, artwork), photos.
  • Color preferences.
  • Style description - what kind of look are you going for?
  • 3 websites you like. Show me what speaks to you.
  • What you want included, and what you want to avoid.
  • Any special functionality you need beyond standard ecommerce.

How It Works

There are 6 steps:

Planning: If it’s a rebuild, I review your current content and recommend improvements. If it’s new, we talk through what you want the site to do and I build an outline.

Mockup Design: I create a homepage concept - colors, fonts, image style, layout. This is where you see the look and feel.

Design Revision: You review the initial design and request changes.

Development: Once you approve the design, I move into build.

Testing: Final set of tests to make sure everything works.

Launch: You approve, we go live. That’s the end of the project.

What’s Included

The package covers website build and launch, plus 30 days of support after we go live. Hosting is separate - you can add it for an additional monthly fee if needed.

You also get the BMG dashboard, form lead tracking, review widget, and automated weekly/monthly reporting.

service_tiers.title: WordPress - Advanced
service_tiers.excerpt: A custom 20-page WordPress website built for medium-scale businesses that need user registration, content management, and a professional online presence. Modern, responsive, and optimized for all devices.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is a full custom WordPress build - no templates, no shortcuts. Twenty pages, designed and developed specifically for your business.

It’s built for businesses that need more than a simple brochure site. User registration, content changes, ongoing management - all handled through WordPress’s straightforward backend. You’ll be able to update content yourself without calling me every time you need to change a paragraph.

The site works on phones, tablets, desktops. Every page is optimized for whatever device your customers are using.

How It Works

I need a few things from you upfront:

  • What your business does and what the site needs to accomplish
  • Domain name and hosting details (or I can help set those up)
  • Your content, branding (logo, colors), and photos
  • Style direction - show me 3 sites you like, tell me what to include and what to avoid
  • Any special functionality you need beyond standard WordPress features

Once I have that, we move through six steps:

  1. Planning - I review your content (if it’s a rebuild) or outline the site structure (if it’s new)
  2. Mockup Design - I create a homepage concept with your colors, fonts, image style, layout
  3. Design Revision - You review and request changes
  4. Development - I build the full site once the design is approved
  5. Testing - I run through everything to make sure it all works
  6. Launch - Final approval from you, then we go live

Typical timeline is 2-3 weeks, depending on how complex the design is and how many revision rounds you need.

What’s Included

This package covers the website build and launch, plus 30 days of support after we go live. Hosting is separate - you can provide your own or I can set it up for an additional monthly fee.

You don’t need all your content ready before we start. I can use placeholder text and images while you’re finishing up your copy and photos. Just helpful if you can provide final text and images before I design the homepage mockup.

Technology

I build on WordPress CMS. If needed, I’ll integrate premium themes or page builders like DIVI, which lets you create new pages later using drag-and-drop without needing to write code. Everything is built with HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and PHP.

Add-Ons Available

  • Call Tracking (Local Number) - $19 one-time setup
  • Call Tracking (Toll-Free Number) - $25 one-time setup

service_tiers.title: WordPress - Value
service_tiers.excerpt: A simple, modern WordPress website for small businesses that need an online presence without the complexity. Perfect for informative sites that don't change much.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is a 10-page custom WordPress website built for your business. Mobile-friendly, modern design, optimized for all devices. Good for service businesses, local shops, or anyone who needs a solid online presence without constant updates.

What I Need From You

  • Description of your business and what the website should do
  • Domain name and hosting details (if you already have them)
  • Content: text, photos, logo, any branding you’ve got
  • Color preferences and style direction
  • 3 websites you like (so I know what you’re going for)
  • Any special functionality you need (contact forms, booking, etc.)
  • Things you definitely don’t want

How It Works

Six steps:

  1. Planning - We go over your current content (if rebuilding) or map out the site structure (if new).
  2. Mockup Design - I send you a homepage concept: colors, fonts, layout, image style.
  3. Design Revision - You review it, request changes.
  4. Development - Once approved, we build the full site.
  5. Testing - We make sure everything works.
  6. Launch - You approve, we go live. Project done.

Typical timeline: 2-3 weeks, depending on how fast you get me content and how many revisions you need.

Built Custom, No Templates

Everything is custom. We don’t use templates. WordPress CMS, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, PHP. If you want a drag-and-drop page builder like DIVI so you can edit pages yourself later, we can do that too.

What’s NOT Included

Hosting is separate. This package covers the website build and 30 days of support after launch. If you need hosting, we can set that up for an additional monthly fee.

Content

If you’ve got text and photos ready before we start the homepage design, that helps. But you don’t need everything finalized upfront. We can use placeholder content while you finish writing.

Revisions

You get one round of design revisions included. Take your time on that round and catch everything. Extra revisions cost extra.

Support After Launch

30 days of email support included. Response time during business hours is usually under 24 hours. After that, ongoing support is available if you need it.

Add-Ons Available

  • Call tracking (local or toll-free number)
  • Additional optimization work

No hidden costs. If scope changes mid-project, we’ll tell you before doing extra work.

service_tiers.title: WordPress - Basic
service_tiers.excerpt: A clean, professional WordPress site built for your business. Five pages, fully responsive, ready to launch.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is a straightforward WordPress build. Five custom pages. Mobile-optimized. No templates. Built by actual designers and developers.

It’s for businesses that need a solid online presence without ongoing content updates. A brochure site, essentially. You get the design, the development, and 30 days of support after launch.

What We Need From You

Before we start, I need a few things:

  • A description of your business.
  • What the site is for. Lead generation? Information? Both?
  • Domain name and hosting details.
  • Content for the pages (text, photos).
  • Branding assets (logo, colors, any existing artwork).
  • Style references. Send me 3 sites you like.
  • Any special functionality you need.

If you don’t have everything ready, we can start with placeholder content and swap it in later.

How It Works

Step 1 - Planning: We review your content (if it’s a rebuild) or gather info about what you need (if it’s new). I develop an outline.

Step 2 - Mockup Design: We create a homepage concept. Colors, fonts, layout, image style.

Step 3 - Design Revision: You review the mockup. You get one round of revisions included. Make it count.

Step 4 - Development: Once you approve the design, we build it out.

Step 5 - Testing: We run final checks. Make sure everything works.

Step 6 - Launch: You approve, we launch. Project complete.

Timeline: Usually 2-3 weeks, depending on how quickly you get me feedback and content.

Technology Stack

We build on WordPress. HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, PHP. If you want a premium page builder like DIVI (drag-and-drop, no coding required), we can set that up. Makes it easier for you to add pages down the road without calling me every time.

service_tiers.title: YouTube Cover and Profile Photo Design
service_tiers.excerpt: Get a custom YouTube cover and profile photo designed to match your brand. One-time design service, delivered in high-res files ready to upload.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

I design a YouTube cover (channel banner) and profile photo that fit your brand. You send me your logo, colors, and any photos or text you want included. I format everything to YouTube’s exact specs so it looks right on desktop, mobile, and TV.

Why This Works

YouTube crops images differently depending on where someone views your channel. The safe area for text is narrow. If you just upload a random image, half of it gets cut off on mobile. I design within YouTube’s layout constraints so nothing important gets cropped.

You get source files and final exports. If YouTube changes their dimensions later, you can come back and I’ll reformat it.

What I Need From You

  • Your logo (vector preferred, high-res PNG works)
  • Brand colors (hex codes if you have them)
  • Any photos or graphics you want in the banner
  • Text for the banner (tagline, services, contact info, etc.)
  • Current profile photo if you want it refreshed, or a new photo/logo to use

If you don’t have all of that, we’ll figure it out. I can work with what you’ve got.

Deliverables

  • YouTube cover image (2560x1440px, optimized safe zones)
  • Profile photo (800x800px, circular crop preview)
  • High-res files delivered via your BMG dashboard
  • One round of revisions included

This is a one-time design service. If you need changes later (new tagline, updated photo, etc.), just grab another order and I’ll update it.

service_tiers.title: Display Ads Starter
service_tiers.excerpt: Small-budget display advertising for Boise businesses. Get your brand in front of the right people on the Google Display Network, news sites, YouTube, Gmail, mobile apps, without blowing your ad spend. Perfect for monthly ad budgets up to $500.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is display advertising for businesses that need visibility but aren’t ready to spend thousands on ads. You get a professional Google Display campaign targeting customers by interest and behavior, not just keywords.

How It Works

I set up your Google Ads account and build a display campaign on the Google Display Network. That’s the massive network of sites, apps, YouTube videos, and Gmail inboxes where Google shows ads. Over 90% of internet users see these sites every day.

Your campaign runs on: - Content targeting: I pick up to 5 topics or keywords that match your offer. Your ads show up when people are browsing content related to those topics. - 1 static image ad: a square or rectangle image with your branding and offer. - 1 Google display banner: a standard banner format that runs across the network.

I optimize placements as data comes in. If a site or app isn’t converting, I pull it. If something’s working, I push more budget there.

You get: - Weekly PPC status reports (what’s running, what changed) - Monthly performance reports (clicks, impressions, cost-per-click, conversions if tracking is set up) - Real-time task tracking on your BMG dashboard

What This Is Good For

Display ads work when you want to stay visible while people are browsing, not just when they’re searching. Think brand awareness, retargeting site visitors, promoting an event or seasonal offer.

This plan is for campaigns spending up to $500/month on ads. The ad spend is separate, you pay Google directly through your Ads account. My fee covers setup, targeting, creative placement, and optimization.

What You Need

A Google Ads account (I can set one up if you don’t have one). At least one piece of creative, a product photo, logo lockup, or promotional graphic. If you don’t have banner creative, we can discuss that separately.

Reporting and Transparency

You see every task I complete on the dashboard. Weekly emails with status updates. Monthly reports with performance data. No surprises, no jargon unless you want it.

service_tiers.title: Advertising 2 Plan
service_tiers.excerpt: For campaigns with a monthly ad spend up to $1200. We handle Google Display Network targeting, up to 10 content-based keywords, 4 image ads and 2 banner ads, placement optimization, and weekly and monthly reporting.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This plan is built for campaigns with a medium monthly ad spend budget (up to $1200/mo). We set up and manage your Google Display Network campaigns so you can reach people while they’re browsing websites, watching YouTube, checking Gmail, or using mobile apps.

The Display Network reaches over 90% of internet users worldwide. We use targeting options to show your ads in the right contexts (specific websites or content themes), to the right audiences (demographics, interests, shopping behavior), and in the right locations.

What’s Included

  • Google Ads account setup
  • Google Display Network targeting
  • 4 image ads
  • 2 Google display banner ads
  • Content-based keyword targeting (up to 10 keywords)
  • Display ad and placement optimization
  • Geographic bidding
  • Device bidding
  • Demographic bidding
  • Interest-based targeting
  • Automated weekly PPC status reports
  • Monthly PPC performance reports

How It Works

You work directly with me. Behind me is a team that handles the day-to-day optimization and reporting.

Every action we take shows up in your BMG dashboard in real time. You’ll see exactly where your PPC dollars are going. We monitor the campaign weekly, adjust bids and placements as needed, and send you automated reports so you always know how things are performing.

What to Expect

After you sign up, I’ll reach out to schedule a kickoff call. We’ll discuss your campaign objectives, target audience, and account strategy. Then we launch the campaign and check in weekly and monthly with updates and any changes needed to improve performance.

Landing Pages

A strong landing page is critical for any PPC campaign. People clicking your ads have purchase intent. The landing page needs to match that intent. We offer free landing page analysis with our proposal. Landing page optimization and setup are available as an add-on.

service_tiers.title: Display Advertising - Growth Plan
service_tiers.excerpt: Full-scale Google Display campaigns for businesses spending up to $4,000/month on ads. I handle everything from banner creation to placement optimization so your ads reach the right audience at the right time.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is for businesses ready to run serious display campaigns. You’re spending up to $4,000/month on ads, and you need someone who knows how to make that budget work.

I build and manage the entire campaign. Google Display Network targeting across millions of sites, apps, YouTube, Gmail. Up to 30 content-based keywords, 10 custom image ads, 5 Google display banners. I optimize placements weekly, adjust bids by device and location, and refine targeting based on what’s working.

You’re not guessing where your money goes. Every placement, every keyword, every adjustment shows up in your dashboard. Weekly check-ins, monthly performance reports, and direct access to me when you need it.

How It Works

Targeting That Actually Finds Buyers

Google Display Network reaches over 90% of internet users. The trick is showing your ads to the right 0.01% of that audience.

I layer targeting methods: - Content-based keywords - your ads appear on pages about specific topics - Interest targeting - reach people based on their browsing habits - Intent targeting - catch users actively researching products like yours - Topic targeting - show up across entire categories of content - Managed placements - I hand-pick high-performing sites for your ads

Geographic, Device, and Demographic Bidding

Not every click is worth the same. I adjust bids based on: - Location (spend more in your best markets) - Device (mobile vs desktop performance) - Demographics (age, household income, parental status)

This keeps cost-per-click down and conversion rates up.

Creative That Performs

10 image ads and 5 Google display banners, all built for your campaign. I test variations and rotate the winners. Ads get stale fast - I refresh creative when performance drops.

Continuous Optimization

Display campaigns need constant attention. I monitor performance daily, optimize placements weekly, and adjust strategy monthly based on real data. Underperforming placements get paused. High-performing placements get more budget.

What’s Included

  • Google Ads account setup and configuration
  • Google Display Network targeting across all placements
  • 10 custom image ads
  • 5 Google display banner ads
  • Content-based keyword targeting (up to 30 keywords)
  • Display ad and placement optimization
  • Managed placements (hand-selected sites)
  • Geographic bidding
  • Device bidding (mobile, desktop, tablet)
  • Demographic bidding
  • Interest-based targeting
  • Intent-based targeting
  • Topic targeting
  • Automated weekly status reports
  • Monthly performance reports

Why Display Advertising Works

Search ads catch people looking for you right now. Display ads build awareness with people who will need you soon.

You show up while they’re reading news, watching YouTube, checking email. When they’re ready to buy, you’re the name they remember.

It’s top-of-funnel work that feeds the rest of your marketing. Retargeting, search campaigns, direct traffic - they all perform better when display advertising keeps your brand in front of potential customers.
service_tiers.content_html:
What You Get

This is for businesses ready to run serious display campaigns. You’re spending up to $4,000/month on ads, and you need someone who knows how to make that budget work.

I build and manage the entire campaign. Google Display Network targeting across millions of sites, apps, YouTube, Gmail. Up to 30 content-based keywords, 10 custom image ads, 5 Google display banners. I optimize placements weekly, adjust bids by device and location, and refine targeting based on what’s working.

You’re not guessing where your money goes. Every placement, every keyword, every adjustment shows up in your dashboard. Weekly check-ins, monthly performance reports, and direct access to me when you need it.

How It Works

Targeting That Actually Finds Buyers

Google Display Network reaches over 90% of internet users. The trick is showing your ads to the right 0.01% of that audience.

I layer targeting methods:
– Content-based keywords – your ads appear on pages about specific topics
– Interest targeting – reach people based on their browsing habits
– Intent targeting – catch users actively researching products like yours
– Topic targeting – show up across entire categories of content
– Managed placements – I hand-pick high-performing sites for your ads

Geographic, Device, and Demographic Bidding

Not every click is worth the same. I adjust bids based on:
– Location (spend more in your best markets)
– Device (mobile vs desktop performance)
– Demographics (age, household income, parental status)

This keeps cost-per-click down and conversion rates up.

Creative That Performs

10 image ads and 5 Google display banners, all built for your campaign. I test variations and rotate the winners. Ads get stale fast – I refresh creative when performance drops.

Continuous Optimization

Display campaigns need constant attention. I monitor performance daily, optimize placements weekly, and adjust strategy monthly based on real data. Underperforming placements get paused. High-performing placements get more budget.

What’s Included

  • Google Ads account setup and configuration
  • Google Display Network targeting across all placements
  • 10 custom image ads
  • 5 Google display banner ads
  • Content-based keyword targeting (up to 30 keywords)
  • Display ad and placement optimization
  • Managed placements (hand-selected sites)
  • Geographic bidding
  • Device bidding (mobile, desktop, tablet)
  • Demographic bidding
  • Interest-based targeting
  • Intent-based targeting
  • Topic targeting
  • Automated weekly status reports
  • Monthly performance reports

Why Display Advertising Works

Search ads catch people looking for you right now. Display ads build awareness with people who will need you soon.

You show up while they’re reading news, watching YouTube, checking email. When they’re ready to buy, you’re the name they remember.

It’s top-of-funnel work that feeds the rest of your marketing. Retargeting, search campaigns, direct traffic – they all perform better when display advertising keeps your brand in front of potential customers.

service_tiers.title: Amazon Ads Custom Plan
service_tiers.excerpt: Full-service Amazon PPC management. We set up your Sponsored Products campaigns, run keyword research, optimize bids, test ad copy, and send you weekly reports. You focus on running your business.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is hands-on Amazon advertising management. I handle the account setup, build your Sponsored Products campaigns, manage your bids, and test ad copy until we find what works. You get weekly reports so you always know what’s running and how it’s performing.

What’s Included

  • Full Amazon PPC account setup
  • Sponsored Products campaign creation and management
  • Product Display Ads
  • Headline Search Ads
  • Keyword research targeting buyers on Amazon
  • Bid management to keep your cost-per-click in check
  • A/B ad copy testing
  • Ongoing ad optimization based on performance data
  • Conversion tracking so we know what’s actually driving sales
  • Weekly PPC reports
  • Monthly performance summaries

Note: Product inventory feed creation (if needed) is billed separately.

Who This Is For

If you sell on Amazon and want more visibility without spending all day managing bids and tweaking campaigns, this is it. We handle the technical work. You get the traffic.

How It Works

Once you sign up, we kick things off with a call to understand your products, your goals, and who you’re trying to reach. Then we build the campaigns, launch them, and start optimizing. You’ll get weekly updates on what’s running and monthly breakdowns of performance. Everything lives in your dashboard so you can check in anytime.

What PPC Can and Can’t Do

PPC puts your products in front of people actively searching for what you sell. It’s not a guarantee of sales, but it’s the most direct way to reach buyers with purchase intent. A good landing page (or product page) is critical. If your page isn’t set up to convert, even great ads won’t close the sale. We can review your pages and recommend improvements.

Transparency

You’ll have full visibility into campaign performance through your dashboard. We don’t hide the numbers. You see impressions, clicks, conversions, and cost. If something isn’t working, we change it.

service_tiers.title: Dynamic PPC Plan
service_tiers.excerpt: Built for campaigns running up to $20,000/month in ad spend. You get Google Ads, Bing Ads, conversion tracking, click fraud monitoring, and all the extensions and optimization that make paid search work.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is the plan for serious ad budgets. Up to $20,000/month in spend, managed end-to-end. Google Ads, Bing Ads, Search Network placement, full conversion tracking, click fraud detection, and every extension Google offers, sitelinks, callouts, call extensions, structured snippets, location pins.

You work directly with me. Behind me is a full team, Google and Bing certified, that handles campaign builds, bid management, negative keyword sweeps, geographic analysis, and weekly reporting. You get the personal attention, they do the execution.

What We Do

Site Assessment & Intake We audit your site, your current presence, your target audience. We figure out what you’re selling and who’s buying.

Keyword Research & Ad Groups Comprehensive keyword research. Tight ad groups built around search intent. Bid management from day one. If you want certain keywords prioritized, we do that.

Ad Creation Our PPC team writes ads that match the keywords in each group. We can layer in business location, contact info, service pricing, anything that helps the click convert.

Automated Reporting Weekly and monthly performance reports go out automatically. You’ll see spend, clicks, conversions, cost-per-acquisition, everything that matters.

Why This Works

White-Label Dashboard You get a BMG-branded dashboard. Your clients (if you’re an agency) or you (if you’re the business owner) can log in anytime and see campaign performance in real time. Email notifications come from your domain, not ours.

No Setup Fees We don’t charge onboarding fees. The monthly price is the monthly price.

Full Transparency Every task we complete shows up in your dashboard. Every dollar spent is accounted for. You’ll have direct access to the Google Ads and Bing Ads accounts we set up, full admin access, no gatekeeping.

Active Campaign Monitoring We watch every campaign for performance drops, budget pacing issues, keyword decay. Weekly and monthly check-ins keep the campaign aligned with your goals.

service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This plan handles Google Shopping campaigns from setup to reporting. I’ll get your products showing up in Google’s shopping results, track conversions, and send you weekly updates on performance.

Here’s what’s included:

  • Advertising through Google Ads
  • Targeting up to 50 products
  • Google Shopping campaign setup
  • Shopping data feed creation and configuration (if you need it)
  • Basic conversion tracking so you know what’s driving sales
  • Weekly PPC reports
  • Monthly performance summaries

How It Works

Site Assessment: I audit your website, look at your current online presence, and figure out who we’re targeting and what you’re trying to accomplish.

Keyword Research & Ad Groups: I do the keyword research, build out ad groups, and manage bids. If you have priorities (certain products you want to push harder), I’ll weight the campaign accordingly.

Creating the Ads: Based on keyword research, I create targeted ads that show up at the top of Google search results. We can customize these to showcase reviews, contact info, and whatever else makes sense.

Automated Reporting: Weekly and monthly reports go out automatically. You’ll see what’s working and what isn’t.

Key Features

Dashboard Access: You get a branded dashboard showing campaign progress in real time. Every task I complete shows up there. Email notifications come from your branded domain, not mine.

No Setup Fees: You pay the monthly rate. That’s it. No account setup charges.

Transparency: The dashboard shows exactly where your ad dollars are going. Every PPC task is logged as it happens.

Ongoing Monitoring: I watch the campaigns, identify what needs adjusting, and send automated updates weekly and monthly to keep you in the loop.

service_tiers.title: Ecommerce 2 Plan
service_tiers.excerpt: Built for online stores spending up to $1,500/month on ads. We set up your Google Shopping campaigns, get up to 500 products in front of shoppers, and track every conversion so you know what's working.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is a Google Shopping campaign built to move product. If you’re running an online store and spending up to $1,500/month on ads, this plan gives you the infrastructure to compete.

We handle the technical setup, Google Merchant Center, product feed, Shopping campaigns, and keep it running. You get conversion tracking so you know which products are selling, which ads are working, and where your money’s going.

Here’s What We Do

Google Shopping Setup - Campaign structure for up to 500 products - Google Merchant Center account setup - Product data feed creation and configuration - Shopping campaign optimization

Tracking & Analytics - Advanced conversion tracking (sales, revenue, product performance) - Google Analytics setup with funnel tracking - Weekly performance reports - Monthly summary reports

Ongoing Management - Keyword optimization for Shopping campaigns - Bid adjustments based on performance - Campaign monitoring and improvement recommendations

How It Works

Site Assessment We audit your site, review your product catalog, and map out your target audience.

Campaign Structure We build out ad groups, research relevant keywords, and set up bid management for your Shopping campaigns.

Ad Creation We create Shopping ads that showcase your products at the top of Google search results. These ads include product images, pricing, reviews, and store info.

Reporting Weekly and monthly reports show campaign performance. You’ll see what’s working in real time through your dashboard.

Why This Matters

Google Shopping ads put your products directly in front of people searching for what you sell. They show product images, prices, and reviews before someone even clicks, which means the traffic you get is more qualified.

We don’t just set it and forget it. We monitor performance, adjust bids, optimize product targeting, and send you updates every week so you know where your ad spend is going.

What Makes This Different

Your Dashboard You get a branded dashboard that tracks every action we take and shows campaign performance in real time. No guessing.

No Setup Fees We don’t charge account setup fees. You pay for the work, not the paperwork.

Transparent Reporting Every PPC task we complete shows up in your dashboard. You’ll see exactly where your ad dollars are going and what results they’re generating.

Campaign Monitoring We watch your campaigns continuously, identify areas for improvement, and send automated updates on performance.
