service_tiers.title: Ecommerce 3 Plan
service_tiers.excerpt: For online stores running up to $2,500/month in Google Ads. We handle your Shopping campaigns, product feeds, conversion tracking, and monthly revenue reporting so you can focus on fulfilling orders.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This plan is built for ecommerce businesses spending up to $2,500/month on Google Ads. I set up and manage your Google Shopping campaigns, connect up to 1,000 products, build your Merchant Center feed, and wire in conversion tracking so you know exactly what’s driving sales.

What’s Included

  • Google Shopping campaign setup - Your products appear in Google search results with images, prices, and store info.
  • Up to 1,000 products targeted - We handle feed creation and optimization for your catalog.
  • Google Merchant Center setup - The backend system that powers Shopping ads.
  • Advanced conversion tracking - You’ll see which clicks turn into orders.
  • Google Analytics ecommerce tracking - Full funnel visibility from ad click to checkout.
  • Weekly PPC reports - Quick snapshots of performance.
  • Monthly revenue reports - The numbers that matter: spend, sales, ROAS.

How It Works

Site assessment and intake - I review your site, catalog, and goals. We discuss your audience and what you want to accomplish.

Keyword research and ad groups - I build out your campaign structure, prioritize products, and set initial bids.

Feed optimization and ads - Your product data gets formatted for Google. Ads are created to highlight what sells.

Ongoing monitoring and reporting - You get weekly updates and monthly revenue breakdowns. I adjust bids, refine targeting, and optimize based on what’s working.

Why This Works

You’re not guessing what products to push or how much to bid. The tracking shows you which SKUs are profitable and which need work. The reports are automated, the dashboard updates in real time, and you have full visibility into where your ad budget is going.

This isn’t about spending more. It’s about spending smarter.

service_tiers.title: Local Search Ads Plan
service_tiers.excerpt: Google Local Service Ads for local businesses. Get the Google Guaranteed badge, show up at the top of search results, and pay per lead instead of per click.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is Google Local Service Ads management. It’s a different animal from regular Google Ads. You show up at the very top of search results with a green Google Guaranteed badge. You only pay when someone contacts you directly through the ad.

Google has eligibility requirements for Local Service Ads. Background checks, license verification, insurance proof. We handle the signup process and help you get the Google Guaranteed badge. Once you’re approved, we build and manage the campaign.

What We Do

  • Get your Local Service Ad account set up and approved
  • Walk you through the Google Guaranteed badge process
  • Build your campaign with the right service categories and service areas
  • Write ad copy that converts
  • Set your budget and adjust bids based on what’s working
  • Test new keywords and service categories as your campaign runs
  • Monitor performance and make adjustments weekly
  • Send you reports so you know exactly what you’re getting

You work directly with me. The reporting happens every week, plus a full breakdown monthly. Initial setup report goes out once the campaign is live.

service_tiers.content_raw:
What You’re Getting

The Power Plan is for businesses ready to scale their paid search. You’re spending real money on ads every month, and you need someone to make sure every dollar works.

I handle Google Ads and Bing Ads. You get conversion tracking that actually works, click fraud monitoring so you’re not paying for bots, and all the extensions (sitelinks, callouts, call tracking) that make your ads stand out.

How It Works

Site assessment and intake: I audit your website and online presence. I gather information about who you’re targeting and what you’re trying to accomplish.

Keyword research and ad groups: I do comprehensive keyword research, build tightly themed ad groups, and manage your bids. If you have priorities, I work those in.

Creating ads that work: Based on the research, I write ads that target the right keywords. I can customize them to show your locations, contact info, service pricing, whatever makes sense for your business.

Automated reports: You get weekly and monthly PPC performance reports automatically. You always know what’s happening with your campaigns.

Why This Works

White-label dashboard: You get a branded dashboard where you can track campaign progress anytime. Email notifications come from Boise Marketing Guy, so if you’re reselling this to your own clients, it looks like yours.

No setup fees: I don’t charge account setup fees. You pay the monthly rate and we get to work.

Full transparency: The dashboard shows you exactly where your ad dollars are going. Every task I complete is logged in real-time. You can see what’s being done and why.

Campaign monitoring: I monitor your campaigns continuously. I look for areas to improve, add negative keywords, pause underperformers, and adjust bids. You get weekly and monthly updates on performance.

service_tiers.title: Retargeting 1
service_tiers.excerpt: For campaigns with up to $500/month in ad spend. We set up remarketing, run image ads on Google's display network, and optimize placement.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You’re Getting

This is entry-level retargeting. You get Google Ads account setup, remarketing tag installed on your site, one image ad, one display banner, and basic placement optimization. We target people who visited your site but didn’t convert, following them around the web with your ads on Google’s display network.

Why Retargeting Works

Most visitors don’t buy on the first visit. Retargeting puts your brand back in front of them while they browse other sites. It’s not a guarantee of sales, but it’s one of the more cost-effective ways to stay visible to people who already showed interest.

What to Expect

You work directly with me. I’ll walk you through campaign goals on the kickoff call. After that, you get weekly PPC reports and a monthly performance summary (includes click fraud report). The team handles ad creation, tag installation, and ongoing placement tweaks.

Dashboard Access

You’ll see every task we complete on your BMG dashboard. Real-time tracking of what we did, when, and how the campaign’s performing. No guessing where your ad dollars went.

Landing Pages

If you’re sending traffic to your homepage, we should talk. A dedicated landing page converts better. We do free landing page analysis and can set one up for an extra fee if needed.

Budget Note

This plan covers our work. Your ad spend (up to $500/month) is separate, that’s what you pay Google directly.

service_tiers.title: Retargeting 2
service_tiers.excerpt: Built for campaigns running up to $1,200/month in ad spend. We set up your remarketing, run image and banner ads across Google's display network, and optimize placements to bring visitors back.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This package handles your Google display retargeting from setup through ongoing optimization. You work directly with me. The team behind me builds the ads, installs the tracking, and monitors performance.

Here’s what we do:

  • Set up your Google Ads account and install the remarketing tag on your site
  • Target up to 5 specific pages (so you can retarget visitors who looked at your services page differently than visitors who hit your homepage)
  • Create 4 image ads and 2 Google display banners
  • Run A/B split tests to see which ads pull better
  • Optimize ad placements based on where your audience actually converts
  • Send you weekly and monthly performance reports

The idea is simple: someone visits your site, doesn’t buy, leaves. Now your ad follows them around the web while they’re reading news, checking email, browsing YouTube. When they’re ready, they remember you.

Dashboard Access

You get a BMG dashboard where you can log in anytime and see exactly what we’re doing, every ad created, every placement change, all the performance data. No waiting for a monthly call to find out what happened.

Who This Works For

Best fit: you’re running Google Ads or Facebook ads already, getting traffic to your site, but not everyone converts on the first visit. Retargeting picks up those people and brings them back. If you’re spending $800, $1,200/month on ads and want to squeeze more conversions out of that traffic, this is the right tier.

service_tiers.title: Retargeting 3
service_tiers.excerpt: Designed for campaigns with monthly ad spend up to $4,000. You get full remarketing setup, Google Display Network and AdRoll campaigns, page-specific retargeting, custom image ads and display banners, placement optimization, and A/B split testing.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is the full retargeting package. You’ve already paid to get visitors to your site. This brings them back when they leave without buying.

We set up remarketing tags on your site, build image ads and display banners, and run them across Google Display Network and AdRoll. Your ads follow your visitors around the web. When someone looks at your product page and bounces, they see your ad on the next site they visit.

We track which pages people visit and retarget them with the right message. Someone who looked at your pricing page gets a different ad than someone who read a blog post. We test multiple ad versions against each other, cut the losers, and scale the winners.

You see every placement, every click, every dollar spent in your dashboard. Weekly reports show what’s working. Monthly reports include click fraud monitoring so you’re not paying for bot traffic.

This Package Includes

  • Google Ads account setup and management
  • Remarketing tag installation on your site
  • Campaigns on Google Display Network
  • Campaigns on AdRoll network
  • Page-specific retargeting for up to 10 pages
  • 8 custom image ads
  • 3 Google display banners
  • A/B split testing of all ad creatives
  • Advanced placement optimization (we pull your ads from sites that don’t convert)
  • Weekly and monthly performance reports with click fraud analysis

Why This Works

Most visitors leave without converting. Retargeting keeps you in front of them while they’re still thinking about it. The average customer needs 7-8 touchpoints before they buy. This gets you those touchpoints without paying for new traffic.

We don’t just spray your logo across the internet. We segment by page visited, time on site, and actions taken. Someone who spent 5 minutes on your services page gets a different message than someone who glanced at your homepage.

The dashboard shows you exactly where your ad budget is going. Every placement, every click, cost per conversion. You’re not guessing. You’re watching it happen in real time.

service_tiers.title: Standard PPC Plan
service_tiers.excerpt: For campaigns with up to $4,000/month in ad spend. Google Ads on the Search Network, conversion tracking, and everything you need to get started.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is for campaigns spending up to $4,000/month on Google Ads. You get the Search Network, conversion tracking, extension setup, and ongoing optimization.

I handle the strategy and account management. The team builds the campaigns, writes the ads, and runs the reports.

How It Works

Site Assessment

We audit your website and online presence. We figure out who you’re trying to reach and what you want to accomplish.

Keyword Research and Ad Groups

We do the keyword research. We build tightly themed ad groups. We manage bids. If you have priority keywords, we work those in.

Ad Creation

Based on the keyword research, we write ads that match search intent. We use extensions to showcase your location, phone number, services, pricing, whatever makes sense.

Reporting

You get weekly and monthly reports automatically. You also get a dashboard where you can see campaign performance anytime.

Key Features

Dashboard: Track everything in your BMG dashboard. White-labeled, so it looks like yours if you’re reselling this. Email notifications come from your domain.

No Setup Fees: Monthly price is the monthly price. No onboarding charges.

Transparency: Every task shows up on the dashboard in real time. You see exactly what we’re doing and when.

Monitoring: We watch the campaigns constantly. If something’s underperforming, we adjust it. Weekly and monthly reports keep you in the loop.

service_tiers.title: Traffic Plan
service_tiers.excerpt: Built for campaigns with small monthly ad spend (up to $1500/mo). You get Google Ads on the Search Network, basic conversion tracking, and everything you need to start driving paid traffic without wasting budget.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You’re Getting

This is a Google Ads campaign for businesses that need traffic now but don’t have massive budgets to blow. You’re capped at $1500/mo in ad spend, which is plenty for most Boise businesses starting out or testing the waters.

I handle the setup, the keyword research, the ad creation, the bid management, and the ongoing tweaks. You get weekly reports so you know what’s happening, and monthly deep dives so you can see the trend.

How It Works

Month 1 is setup. I audit your site, research keywords, build out ad groups, write the ads, set up conversion tracking, and get everything linked (Google Ads, Analytics, Search Console). I also configure all the ad extensions, sitelinks, callouts, call buttons, structured snippets, location. If you add call tracking, I wire that in too.

Month 2 and beyond is optimization. I’m adjusting bids, adding negative keywords, testing new terms, pausing what doesn’t work, and watching the dashboard for patterns. Weekly and monthly reports keep you in the loop.

Why This Matters

More than 90% of people search Google before they buy. If your site isn’t showing up when they search, you don’t exist. Paid ads get you in front of them immediately. Organic SEO takes months. This starts working the day we go live.

What Makes This Work

Transparency. You see every keyword, every bid adjustment, every dollar spent. The dashboard shows real-time data, clicks, conversions, cost per lead. No smoke and mirrors.

Experience. I’ve run campaigns for Boise businesses across industries. I know what works locally and what burns budget for nothing.

Technology. The platform I use has AI-driven bid optimization and access to massive datasets that tell us which keywords convert and which don’t. That keeps your cost per click competitive.

No setup fees. You pay for the service, not for me to turn it on.

Who This Is For

Small to mid-sized businesses that need leads now. Service businesses, local retailers, event planners, niche services. If you’ve got a website and a phone that rings when customers call, this works.

Not for e-commerce with huge inventories or national brands. That needs a bigger plan.

service_tiers.title: Ultimate Plan
service_tiers.excerpt: Built for high-volume campaigns with monthly ad spend up to $40,000. Includes Google Ads, Bing Ads, click fraud monitoring, geographic targeting, and advanced conversion tracking, everything you need to compete at scale.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You’re Getting

This is the full-stack PPC package. If you’re running serious ad spend, you need serious infrastructure behind it. That’s what this is.

You get Google Ads and Bing Ads management. Complete Google Search Network coverage. Every extension type configured, sitelinks, callouts, call extensions, structured snippets, location extensions. Advanced conversion tracking so you know exactly what’s working. Click fraud monitoring to keep the waste down. Geographic report analysis to see where your money performs best.

I handle the account. The team behind me does the daily work, keyword research, bid adjustments, ad creation, negative keyword management, fraud detection. You see everything in your dashboard. Weekly reports. Monthly performance breakdowns. Scheduled calls with professionals who actually hold Google and Bing certifications.

How It Works

Site Assessment
We start by auditing your website and online presence. I need to understand your target audience and what you’re trying to accomplish before we spend a dollar.

Keyword Research and Ad Groups
Comprehensive keyword research. Tight ad group structure. Smart bid management. We prioritize based on what you tell us matters most.

Creating Ads That Work
Our PPC team writes relevant ads targeting the keywords in those tightly themed groups. We can showcase your locations, contact info, service pricing, whatever converts for your business.

Automated Reporting
Weekly and monthly performance reports go out automatically. You stay informed without chasing updates.

Why This Package Works

Your Branded Dashboard
Track everything through your BMG-branded dashboard. White label notifications go out from my domain to your clients if you’re reselling this. If it’s your own campaign, you just log in and see the data.

No Setup Fees
We don’t charge onboarding fees. Monthly price is the monthly price.

Built on Real Data
We’ve managed millions in paid search spend across thousands of campaigns. That experience feeds the strategy. The AI tools we use leverage that dataset to keep us ahead.

Complete Transparency
Your dashboard shows every task we complete, every dollar spent, every conversion tracked. Real-time reporting. No black box.

Active Campaign Monitoring
We don’t set it and forget it. Constant monitoring to identify improvement areas. Weekly and monthly updates to confirm we’re hitting your goals.

service_tiers.title: YouTube Advertising - Starter Plan
service_tiers.excerpt: Get your YouTube ads running with professional setup, bid management, and weekly reporting. I handle the campaign side, you handle the videos.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is for businesses that already have a YouTube channel and video content ready to go. You want to run ads but don’t want to deal with the campaign setup, bid adjustments, and tracking.

I set up your YouTube Ads account (if you don’t have one), build your campaigns, optimize bids to keep costs efficient, and send you weekly reports so you know what’s working. Monthly summaries keep the big picture clear.

What This Covers

  • YouTube Ads account setup: I’ll get everything configured in Google Ads if you’re starting from scratch.
  • Campaign creation: Your videos, your targeting goals, I build the campaigns.
  • Bid optimization: I adjust bids throughout the month to get better cost per view or conversion.
  • Weekly reporting: Short updates on performance, spend, and any changes I made.
  • Monthly performance reports: Full breakdown of results, trends, and what to adjust next month.

What You Provide

  • Your YouTube videos: This plan doesn’t include video production. You supply the content.
  • An existing YouTube channel: You need a channel up and running before we start ads.

If you need video production, that’s a separate project we can discuss.
service_tiers.content_html:
What You Get

service_tiers.title: YouTube Ads Plan 2
service_tiers.excerpt: Full YouTube ad campaign management. We set up your account, write the ads, optimize bids across devices and locations, and report weekly. You bring the videos, we bring the clicks.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is for businesses that already have a YouTube channel and video content ready to run. We handle the campaign setup, targeting, bidding strategy, and optimization so you can focus on running your business.

Here’s what we do:

  • YouTube Ads Account Setup: We configure your Google Ads account for YouTube campaigns from scratch.
  • Ad Creation & Setup: We write the ad copy, configure placements, and get everything live.
  • Bid Optimization: We adjust bids continuously to maximize performance within your budget.
  • Device Bid Management: Mobile, desktop, tablet, we tailor bids based on where your audience converts.
  • Geo Bid Management: Focus budget on the locations that matter most to your business.
  • Audience Targeting: Demographics, interests, remarketing to viewers who’ve already seen your videos.
  • Weekly PPC Reports: Quick pulse-checks on performance every week.
  • Monthly PPC Performance Reports: Full breakdown of what’s working and what we’re adjusting.

You’ll see all of this activity in your dashboard. Every bid change, every audience tweak, every report, it’s all logged.

What You Need to Provide

  • YouTube Videos: You supply the video content. Video production is a separate service.
  • Existing YouTube Channel: You need an active channel before we can run ads.

How YouTube Ads Work

Pay-per-click (PPC) on YouTube means you only pay when someone watches your ad or clicks through. We put your videos in front of people actively searching for what you offer, or who match your customer profile. It’s targeted visibility, not guesswork.

service_tiers.content_raw:

This is a complete YouTube advertising campaign. I set up your Google Ads account, build and launch your video ads, optimize your bids across devices and locations, and send you performance reports every week.

What’s Included

  • Account Setup: Google Ads and YouTube integration configured from scratch.
  • Ad Creation: I build the campaigns and ad groups using your video assets.
  • Bid Optimization: Ongoing adjustments to keep your cost-per-view in check.
  • Device Targeting: Separate bid strategies for mobile, desktop, and tablet.
  • Geo Targeting: We focus your budget on the locations that matter.
  • Audience Targeting: Demographics, interests, topics, placements, remarketing, and keyword targeting (content-based).
  • Weekly Reports: Every week you see what’s running and what’s working.
  • Monthly Performance Reviews: Deeper analysis of trends and results.

How It Works

Once you sign up, I’ll reach out to schedule a kickoff call. We’ll talk through your goals, your audience, and what you want people to do after they see your ad. Then I launch the campaign and start optimizing. You’ll get weekly check-ins and full dashboard access so you can see performance anytime.

service_tiers.title: Campaign Dashboard
service_tiers.excerpt: Track every piece of your marketing campaign in one place. Your clients log in, see progress in real time, and get automated reports without you lifting a finger.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is the dashboard that powers every campaign we run. Your clients get login credentials. They see keyword rankings, local visibility, review data, traffic stats, social performance, everything we’re doing for them, updated in real time.

You get the same view. So when they call with questions, you’re looking at the same screen they are.

Notifications go out under your business email. The dashboard is branded however you want it. To the client, this looks like your system.

What We Track

Keywords: Up to 20 terms. You’ll see current rank, movement over time, and where the clicks are coming from.

Local Visibility: We pull data from 30+ directories and local search engines. Shows you where the business is listed, where it’s not, and how visible it is across the local ecosystem.

Analytics Integration: Google Analytics, Search Console, My Business, and AdWords all feed into one view. No more toggling between platforms.

Social Networks: Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram. Engagement metrics, follower growth, post performance.

Reviews: Aggregated from Google, Yelp, Facebook, and other platforms. New reviews trigger notifications so you can respond fast.

The dashboard isn’t a summary. It’s the actual working system. Every task we complete logs here. Every keyword we track updates here. Every report your client receives pulls from here.

service_tiers.title: Google Business Profile Optimization
service_tiers.excerpt: We'll set up and optimize your Google Business Profile so you show up when local customers search for what you do. This is a one-time setup that gets you positioned in the local 3-pack.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

I’ll create and fully configure your Google Business Profile from the ground up. That means picking the right secondary categories, defining your service areas, uploading quality photos, and filling out every field that matters.

I also analyze the other businesses showing up in the local 3-pack for your keywords and adjust your profile to compete on the same playing field.

What This Is

This is a setup service. One time. You get a fully optimized profile that follows Google’s best practices and positions you to appear in local search results.

Google decides who ranks in the 3-pack based on relevance, distance, and prominence. I can’t guarantee you’ll land in the top three, but I can make sure your profile is configured to have the best shot.

What Gets Done

  • Full GBP account setup and verification (if needed)
  • Primary and secondary category selection
  • Service area definition
  • Business description optimized for local search
  • Photo uploads (you provide, I upload and optimize)
  • Hours, attributes, and other profile fields completed
  • Competitor analysis (who’s in the 3-pack and why)
  • Profile refinements based on competitor data

Once it’s live, you’ll have a complete, optimized Google Business Profile ready to start showing up in local searches.
service_tiers.content_html:
What You Get

I’ll create and fully configure your Google Business Profile from the ground up. That means picking the right secondary categories, defining your service areas, uploading quality photos, and filling out every field that matters.

I also analyze the other businesses showing up in the local 3-pack for your keywords and adjust your profile to compete on the same playing field.

What This Is

This is a setup service. One time. You get a fully optimized profile that follows Google’s best practices and positions you to appear in local search results.

Google decides who ranks in the 3-pack based on relevance, distance, and prominence. I can’t guarantee you’ll land in the top three, but I can make sure your profile is configured to have the best shot.

What Gets Done

  • Full GBP account setup and verification (if needed)
  • Primary and secondary category selection
  • Service area definition
  • Business description optimized for local search
  • Photo uploads (you provide, I upload and optimize)
  • Hours, attributes, and other profile fields completed
  • Competitor analysis (who’s in the 3-pack and why)
  • Profile refinements based on competitor data

Once it’s live, you’ll have a complete, optimized Google Business Profile ready to start showing up in local searches.

service_tiers.title: Link Building Starter
service_tiers.excerpt: Get contextual backlinks from relevant authority sites. Builds your foundational link profile and helps your pages rank higher.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What This Is

This is foundational link building. You get backlinks from relevant, established properties, the kind that signal trust to Google without looking spammy.

Every link is contextual. That means it sits in real editorial content, not a footer or a sidebar. The content is written with AI-optimized structure (FAQ schema, voice search framing), and it links back to your site naturally.

You also get social signals and directory citations, both send positive ranking signals. The whole package is designed to build authority steadily without risk.

What You Get Each Month

  • 5 trackable keywords: we monitor performance on the terms that matter to your business
  • 1 editorial guest blog: long-form content published on a relevant authority site, optimized for AI search, with a contextual link back to you
  • 5 business citations: directory submissions that reinforce your NAP (name, address, phone) and local relevance
  • 5 social boosts: amplification across social channels to generate engagement signals
  • Weekly and monthly reports: full transparency on what we built and where

How You Track It

You get 24/7 access to your BMG dashboard. Every backlink, every citation, every social post is logged and linked. You can see the live URL of each placement, the anchor text used, and the domain authority of the referring site.

Reports go out weekly (task completion) and monthly (performance summary). You always know what we did and how it’s moving the needle.

What This Solves

Most businesses either buy no backlinks (and wonder why they don’t rank), or they buy cheap bulk links from link farms (and get penalized).

This product sits in the middle: real, safe, measurable link building that Google rewards. It’s not instant, good backlinks take time to index and pass authority, but it’s the right way to build a link profile that lasts.

If you need more volume or faster results, we have higher-tier link building plans. This one is the starter.

service_tiers.excerpt: Contextual backlinks from relevant authority sites. Solid foundation for your rankings.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is a straightforward link-building package. Every month, we build 10 contextual backlinks from mini-authority properties that are relevant to your business. These aren’t random directory spam links. They’re placed in real content that passes link equity to your site.

What’s Included

  • 10 Performance-Based Trackable Keywords: We pick the terms that matter for your business and track how they move.
  • 3 Editorial Guest Blog Posts Optimized for AI Search: Real articles on relevant sites. Written to rank in traditional and AI-driven search results.
  • 10 Business Citations: Directory submissions that reinforce your NAP (name, address, phone) across the web.
  • 10 Social Boosts: Amplify your content on social platforms to generate signals that search engines notice.
  • Weekly and Monthly Reports: Every action we take shows up in your dashboard. No black box.

Why This Works

Backlinks are still a ranking factor. Google wants to see that other sites vouch for you. These links come from properties with real authority. They’re contextual, meaning they’re placed in content that’s related to your industry. That’s what moves the needle.

You’ll see every link we build. The dashboard tracks placement, anchor text, and the source domain. You know exactly what you’re paying for.

Who This Is For

Local businesses that need a steady drip of quality backlinks without the overhead of managing outreach campaigns. Service businesses, professional practices, home services. If you need more visibility in search, this gets you there without the guesswork.

Full Access

You get 24/7 access to your dashboard. Log in anytime to see what’s been done, what’s in progress, and how your keywords are performing. Weekly snapshots and monthly rollups keep you in the loop.

service_tiers.title: Link Building Gold
service_tiers.excerpt: Contextual links from real websites. Builds authority, boosts rankings, and gets your site noticed where it matters.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is foundational link building done right. You get contextual links from relevant mini-authority sites, not spam directories, not blog comment farms. Real properties with editorial standards.

The links are placed in context. That means actual content, on-topic, pointing back to your site in a way that makes sense to readers and search engines.

Why It Works

Search engines rank sites that other sites vouch for. A contextual link is a vote of confidence. The more relevant the source, the stronger the signal.

We focus on quality over volume. The sites we place links on have clean backlinking profiles and topical relevance to your business. That’s what moves the needle.

What’s Included

  • 35 Performance-Based Trackable Keywords: We track ranking movement across 35 keywords you care about.
  • 11 Editorial Guest Blog Posts: Written and placed on relevant sites. Optimized for AI search.
  • 1 Brand Promotional Video Every 2 Months: Short-form video content designed for visual search exposure.
  • 1 Business PPT Every 2 Months: Slide deck summarizing your business. Helps with AI search summarization.
  • 25 Business Citations: Directory submissions to build foundational local presence.
  • 25 Website Social Boosts: Amplifies social signals across platforms.
  • Full Web-Based Dashboard Access: See every link placed, every keyword tracked, every task completed. 24/7 access.
  • Weekly and Monthly Reports: You always know what’s been done and what’s next.

How We Build Links

  1. Research: We identify sites in your industry or adjacent verticals that accept guest content or contextual placements.
  2. Content Creation: We write original editorial content that fits the site and includes your link naturally.
  3. Placement: We publish or pitch the content, negotiate placement, and secure the live link.
  4. Verification: Every link goes into your dashboard with a live URL, anchor text, and placement date.

You see the work as it happens. No black box, no mystery links.

service_tiers.title: Link Building Platinum
service_tiers.excerpt: Contextual links from relevant mini-authority properties. Build your foundation and boost rankings with editorial placements that search engines trust.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You’re Getting

This is serious link building. Not spam directories or comment spam. Real editorial links from curated properties that already have domain authority.

Every link is contextual, embedded in relevant content that makes sense for your business. Search engines weight these higher than bare listings because they signal genuine endorsement, not just a mention.

The mix includes guest blog placements optimized for AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, etc.), social amplification to generate engagement signals, and foundational citation work to establish your NAP consistency across the web.

What Makes This Work

Editorial Guest Blogs (15/month): These aren’t thin posts on junk sites. Each placement is written to answer real search queries and positioned on properties with existing traffic. The links flow naturally from the content. AI search engines index these as authoritative sources when answering user questions about your industry.

Performance-Based Keyword Tracking (50 keywords): We track the terms that matter to your business. You’ll see exactly how your rankings move as the links take effect. Not vanity metrics, actual keywords your customers search.

Brand Assets for Visual and Voice Search: One promotional video, one business PowerPoint, one infographic every two months. These aren’t decorative. Visual search (Google Lens, Pinterest, etc.) and AI summarization tools pull from structured media. If you’re not in those formats, you’re invisible in those channels.

Citation and Social Signals (30 each): Directory submissions establish your NAP (Name, Address, Phone) consistency across the web. Social boosts amplify your content across platforms to generate engagement signals. Both matter for local pack rankings and overall domain authority.

How It’s Structured

All work is reported weekly and monthly. You get 24/7 dashboard access to see every link placed, every citation built, every keyword tracked. No mystery about what’s being done or when.

This runs monthly. The links compound over time , Month 3 rankings reflect Month 1 + Month 2 work. You’re building equity, not renting visibility.

service_tiers.title: Local Gold + AEO
service_tiers.excerpt: Competitive-level local SEO targeting 4 keyword categories with quarterly performance audits. 20 target keywords, 100 trackable keywords, on-page optimization, locally relevant content, editorial posts, and local citation building.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is the second-most competitive local SEO plan I offer. It targets 4 keyword categories, tracks 100 keywords (20 primary targets), and includes quarterly performance audits.

The work focuses on getting your business visible in local Google search results. That means people searching for what you do in Boise (or wherever you operate) find you instead of scrolling past to a competitor.

How It Works

Keyword Strategy: 4 keyword topics, 20 target keywords, 100 tracked keywords total.

On-Page Work: Optimization of website pages every month. Title tags, meta descriptions, header tags, internal linking, local schema, image alt text, page load speed checks.

Local Presence: Monthly backlinks from local directories, business listings, and NAP-enabled citations. This includes Google Business Profile, Bing Local, Apple Maps, Facebook, and others.

Content: Industry-specific editorial content posted monthly. Website content created or modified to improve rankings.

The Process

Site Assessment: I audit your website and online presence. We talk about your target audience and goals.

Keyword Research: I research the 20 best keywords for your industry and location. You approve the list before we move forward.

Content and On-Page Optimization: High-quality content work to engage visitors. Google tools integration, plagiarism check, mobile-friendly verification, and all the technical optimization mentioned above.

Local Optimization: Submitting your business to top local search engines and directories.

Monthly Link Building: Editorial content posting, local citations, and authority business listings to build an authoritative backlink portfolio.

Dashboard Access

You get a custom dashboard (branded as Boise Marketing Guy). Track keyword rankings, see every task completed, monitor campaign progress in real time. Weekly and monthly reports are automated.

No Long-Term Contracts

Month-to-month billing. No obligation beyond the current month.

service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is our top-selling local SEO plan. It’s built for competitive markets where ranking takes real work.

We target 30 keywords across 6 categories. We track 150 keywords total so you see the full picture. Every month we optimize pages, build local backlinks, write content, and expand your citation footprint.

The goal is simple: get your site ranking higher in local Google results. When someone in your area searches for what you do, you show up.

How It Works

Keyword Research We research 30 target keywords based on your industry and location. We share the list, you approve it, and we start ranking work.

On-Page Optimization We optimize your pages: titles, meta descriptions, header tags, internal links, schema markup, image alt text, and page speed. We integrate Google tools, check for plagiarism, and make sure the site works on mobile.

Local Optimization We build your local presence. That means submissions to Google Business Profile, Bing Local, Apple Maps, Facebook, and the directories that matter in your area.

Monthly Link Building We build backlinks every month through guest posts, local citations, and authority business listings. The backlink portfolio is what gets you ranked and keeps you there.

What Makes This Different

Dashboard You get a branded dashboard where you see every task we complete. Real-time reporting. No black box.

No Long-Term Contracts We don’t lock you in. The work speaks for itself.

Transparency Every SEO task is logged in your dashboard. You know exactly where your dollars go.

Monitoring We watch the campaign constantly. If something needs adjustment, we make it. You get automated weekly and monthly updates on performance.

service_tiers.title: Local Starter
service_tiers.excerpt: Entry-level local SEO for tight budgets. One keyword category, 5 target keywords, 25 tracked keywords, on-page optimization, locally relevant content, and local citation building. Startups cover their basics without overextending.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is the starting point for local search. You’re targeting one keyword category - five specific keywords we’ll optimize for, and we’ll track 25 total keywords to monitor where you show up. Every month I’m recommending or performing optimization on your website pages. We’re building backlinks from local directories, setting up business listings, and creating citations so Google knows where you are and what you do.

Content work is ongoing. Industry-specific editorial posts, website content updates, whatever it takes to move you up in local search results.

The Process

Site Assessment and Intake

I audit your website and your current online presence. I need to know your target audience and what you’re trying to accomplish.

Keyword Research

We research the best 5 keywords based on your industry and your physical location. These are the terms that will bring you the most relevant traffic. You approve the final list before we start.

Content and On-Page Optimization

From the audit and keyword research, we implement content optimization to engage visitors. Extensive on-page work includes Google tools integration, plagiarism check, page load time and mobile-friendly check, page title, meta description, header tags, internal linking, local schema setup, image alt tags, and hyperlink optimization.

Local Optimization

service_tiers.title: On-Page Optimization Silver
service_tiers.excerpt: Get a page optimized for search. We handle title tags, meta descriptions, images, headings, and content fixes so the page is ready to rank and convert.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What This Is

On-page optimization is the foundation of ranking. You can’t skip it. Without clean title tags, proper headings, and optimized images, Google won’t understand what your page is about.

This is a one-time service. We take one page (or create a new one from scratch) and make it SEO-ready. You get a full report of everything we changed.

What You Get

We optimize these critical elements:

  • Title & Meta Tags (1 page), The text that shows up in search results. We make it clear, keyword-targeted, and click-worthy.
  • Image Alt Text & Link Titles (1 page), Every image and hyperlink gets descriptive text so Google (and screen readers) know what they are.
  • Heading Tags (H1, H2, H3) (1 page), We structure your content so it’s scannable and keyword-optimized.
  • Broken Link Check & Fixing: We find and fix any dead links on the page. Broken links hurt rankings and user experience.
  • Content Boost for Thin Pages: If your page is too short (under 300 words), we add a 100-word paragraph to strengthen it.
  • Brand New Page Creation: Optionally, we can build a new page from scratch (300 words + image) if you need fresh content instead of optimizing an existing one.

You tell us which page to optimize, or we create a new one. Either way, the work gets done and documented in a full report.

Why It Matters

On-page SEO has a direct impact on conversion rate, not just rankings. A well-optimized page loads faster, reads better, and gives visitors (and Google) exactly what they’re looking for. The results are long-term. Once a page is optimized, it stays optimized.

service_tiers.excerpt: Get one page fully optimized for search. We handle the technical fundamentals that help Google understand your content and rank it properly.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What This Is

On-page optimization is the foundation. You write good content, we make sure Google can read it, understand it, and rank it.

This is a one-time service for a single page on your site. We optimize the core elements that search engines look at when deciding where to rank you. Title tags, meta descriptions, image alt text, heading structure, broken links. All the technical details that most business owners don’t have time to handle.

The work is permanent. Once it’s done, that page is set up correctly. You’ll see the impact in how your page performs over time in search results, how many people click through, and how well the page converts visitors once they land.

What We Do

We go through one page and handle:

  • Title & Meta Tags: The text that shows up in search results. We rewrite it so it’s clear, keyword-focused, and compelling enough to get the click.
  • Image Alt Text & Hyperlink Titles: Every image gets descriptive alt text. Every link gets a proper title attribute. This helps accessibility and gives Google more context about your content.
  • Heading Tags: We structure your H1, H2, H3 tags correctly. This tells Google what the page is about and makes it easier for users to scan.
  • Broken Link Check & Fix: We find any dead links on the page and fix them. Broken links hurt user experience and hurt your ranking.

You get a full report of everything we changed. The page is ready to rank.

service_tiers.title: On-Page Optimization Value
service_tiers.excerpt: Get one page of your site fully dialed in for search. We optimize your titles, meta tags, images, headings, and fix broken links so the page is ready to rank.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What This Is

On-page optimization is the foundation work that makes a page rankable. You can’t skip it. If your title tags are weak, your images have no alt text, and your headings are a mess, Google doesn’t know what the page is about. This fixes that.

We go through one page and optimize the elements that matter:

  • Title and meta tags: rewritten so they’re descriptive and keyword-targeted
  • Image alt text and hyperlink titles: every image and link gets proper labels
  • Heading tags (H1, H2, etc.): structured correctly so search engines can parse the page
  • Broken links: we find them and fix them
  • Thin content: if the page is light, we add a 100-word paragraph to bulk it up

This is a one-time service. You pick the page, we optimize it, you get a full report of what was done. After that, the page is set. It’s ready to compete.

Why It Matters

On-page SEO has a direct impact on how your page ranks. It also affects conversion rate. A page that’s clear, fast, and well-structured keeps visitors on the page longer. That signals quality to Google, and it makes people more likely to take action.

The work we do here is permanent. Once a page is optimized, it stays optimized unless you change something. That means the benefit compounds over time as the page climbs in rankings and starts pulling traffic.

What You Get

One page, fully optimized. You’ll get a report showing every change we made. After that, the page is good to go. If you want more pages done, you can order this service again for each one.

service_tiers.title: Presence Advanced
service_tiers.excerpt: Get your business visible across 50 local search platforms. We'll build, clean up, and monitor your listings so customers can find you everywhere they look.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This package gets your business listed and optimized on the top 50 local search engines, directories, and review sites. We handle the entire process - creating new listings, fixing duplicates, correcting inconsistent information, and keeping everything accurate going forward.

The Work

Listings Assessment We audit your current local presence. We find verified listings, duplicates, inconsistencies, and gaps. You get a full picture of where you stand.

Eliminate Duplicates Multiple listings for the same business confuse search engines and customers. We claim the duplicates and remove them. One clean listing per platform.

Fix Inconsistent Listings Wrong phone number on Yelp. Old address on Bing. These inconsistencies hurt your rankings. We claim the listings and update the data to match your current information.

Optimize Core Platforms We optimize your profiles on Google Business Profile, Bing Local, Apple Maps, Facebook Places, and Yelp. These are the platforms that matter most for local search.

How It Works

You provide your business information once. We handle the rest. You’ll see every listing we create, every duplicate we remove, every correction we make - all tracked in your dashboard.

This is one-time setup work. Once your listings are built and cleaned up, you have the foundation. If you want ongoing monitoring and updates, we have monthly maintenance packages for that.

  • Find and fix duplicate listings on Google Business Profile, Bing Local, Facebook Places, and Yelp
  • Monitor and correct inconsistent business information across all platforms
  • Optimize your core listings (Google Business Profile, Bing Local, Apple Maps, Facebook Places, Yelp)

How It Works

Step 1: Listings Assessment

I run a full audit of your local presence. We identify what’s verified, what’s duplicated, what’s inconsistent, and what’s missing.

Step 2: Eliminate Duplicates

We claim and remove duplicate listings so only one accurate version shows up in search.

Step 3: Fix Inconsistencies

We claim and correct listings showing inaccurate information - wrong phone numbers, old addresses, outdated hours.

Key Features

Your Dashboard

You get a branded BMG dashboard where you can track everything. See what we’ve fixed, check listing accuracy, monitor performance. Email notifications come from us, not some third party.

All-in-One Control

Update and monitor your business information across all major platforms from one place. No logging into 30 different sites.

Campaign Reporting

You’ll see every error we surface, when it got fixed, and how accurate your listings are across the local ecosystem. Full transparency into the work.

No Long-Term Contracts

We don’t lock you in. The work speaks for itself.

Your Dashboard: Track everything in real time. Every task we complete shows up on your dashboard. You see exactly where your money is going.

No Long-Term Contracts: Monthly billing. If it’s not working, you’re not locked in.

Complete Transparency: You get weekly progress reports and full monthly breakdowns. No guessing.

Campaign Monitoring: We watch performance, identify what’s working, and adjust. Automated weekly and monthly updates keep you in the loop.
service_tiers.content_html:
What You’re Getting

This is the right plan if you’re serving Spanish-speaking customers in the Boise area and need real SEO work without breaking the bank. We target 2 keyword categories (10 target keywords total, tracking 50), optimize your site, write locally relevant content in Spanish, and build citations that matter for local search.

What We Focus On

Keyword Topics: We pick 2 keyword themes that make sense for your business and location. All work ties back to these.

Trackable Keywords: 10 target keywords drive the strategy. We track 50 total so you can see movement across your whole footprint.

Optimized Pages: Every month we recommend or perform optimization on your website pages.

Local Link Building: Monthly backlinks from local directories, business listings, and NAP-enabled citations. This is how you show up in “near me” searches.

Content Optimization: Industry-specific editorial content, plus we create or modify website content to improve rankings.

How It Works

Site Assessment: I audit your website, look at your current online presence, and gather info about your audience and goals.

Keyword Research: We research and agree on the 10 best keywords for your industry and location. You approve them before we start.

Content & On-Page Optimization: High-quality content tailored to your audience. Extensive on-page work includes Google tools integration, plagiarism check, page load and mobile checks, page titles, meta descriptions, header tags, internal linking, local schema, image alt text, and hyperlink optimization.

Local Optimization: We submit your business to top local search engines and directories (Google Business Profile, Bing Local, Apple Maps, Facebook, etc.).

Monthly Link Building: Editorial content, local citations, and authoritative business listings. Every month. This builds the backlink portfolio that ranks you for your target keywords.

What Makes This Work

Your Dashboard: Track everything in real time. Every task we complete shows up on your dashboard. You see exactly where your money is going.

No Long-Term Contracts: Monthly billing. If it’s not working, you’re not locked in.

Complete Transparency: You get weekly progress reports and full monthly breakdowns. No guessing.

Campaign Monitoring: We watch performance, identify what’s working, and adjust. Automated weekly and monthly updates keep you in the loop.

service_tiers.title: Best Deal Plan
service_tiers.excerpt: Consistent, authentic social media presence across two platforms. 20 posts per month, full monitoring, and a dashboard that shows you exactly what's getting done. No setup fees. Cancel anytime.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This plan covers two social platforms of your choice: Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, or Instagram. We post 20 times per month (10 business posts about your services, 10 generic posts to keep the feed active), monitor your accounts daily for comments and messages, and give you full access to your BMG dashboard so you can see every post, every response, and every performance metric in real time.

How It Works

Social media assessment: We audit your profiles and give you initial recommendations to improve visibility.

Content plan: We write the posts, send them to you for approval, map out a content roadmap, and schedule everything on a calendar.

Daily monitoring: Your profiles are checked every day for comments and messages.

Performance insights: Weekly status reports and monthly performance summaries are delivered automatically through your dashboard.

Key Features

Post everywhere from one place: Your BMG dashboard is a single spot to publish and schedule posts across both platforms. Our algorithms suggest the best times to post based on past engagement.

Engage your followers: Respond to customers, share ready-to-post content, and build stronger relationships with your audience.

Twitter lead generation (optional): If Twitter is one of your platforms, we can set up keyword searches to find people in your area talking about what you offer.

Complete transparency: Every social task is logged in real time. You see exactly what we’re doing and when.

No setup fees. Cancel anytime. You’re not locked in.

Add-Ons Available

  • Call Tracking (Local Number): $19/month
  • Call Tracking (Toll-Free Number): $25/month

service_tiers.title: Exclusive Business Posts Premium Plan
service_tiers.excerpt: 10 custom posts per month that put your products and services front and center. Built to get engagement and keep your brand visible where your customers are looking.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You’re Getting

This is straightforward. Ten posts per month, written and formatted specifically for your business. Each one highlights something you do, a product, a service, a promotion, whatever makes sense that month.

I write them so they sound like you. They’re designed to work on the platforms you’re already using. Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn. Wherever your customers are.

Why This Works

Consistent posting keeps you in front of people. One post here and there doesn’t build momentum. Ten posts spread across the month does.

Each post is focused on something specific. Not generic filler. Your actual offerings. What you want people to know about and remember.

You approve everything before it goes live. You get the content, you review it, you tell me if anything needs adjusting. Then it’s ready to publish.

How It Works

You tell me what you want to promote that month. New service, seasonal offer, product spotlight, customer success story, whatever you’re focused on.

I draft the posts. You get them in your dashboard. You review, approve, request edits if needed.

Once approved, you can publish them yourself or I can schedule them for you. Either way, the content is ready to go.

Ten posts per month. Every month. As long as you need it.

service_tiers.title: Social Media Posts, Standard Plan
service_tiers.excerpt: Five posts a month. Real content about your business. Keeps your feed active without you having to think about it.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

I write and post five updates per month about your business, services you offer, things happening in your shop, seasonal stuff, whatever makes sense. The goal is simple: keep your social media alive so when people check you out, they don’t see a page that went dark six months ago.

How It Works

You tell me what you want to highlight. I write the posts, find or create the images, and schedule them across your channels. You approve before anything goes live. Then it just runs.

This isn’t ad spend. It’s organic posting. The kind of content that shows up on your page when someone clicks through from Google or a referral.

Who This Is For

Businesses that know they need a social presence but don’t have the time or bandwidth to keep posting. You’re not trying to go viral. You just want your profiles to look current and professional.

If you need more volume or want engagement campaigns, we can talk about stepping up to a higher plan. But for a lot of Boise businesses, five solid posts a month is the right baseline.

service_tiers.excerpt: Drive targeted traffic and connect with your perfect audience. We handle setup, create ad copy, publish posts, and run A/B tests to optimize performance. No setup fees, cancel anytime.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This plan is for businesses that want Facebook advertising handled without the learning curve. I set up the campaign, write the ad copy, publish posts, and monitor performance daily. You get four ad copies per month and four posts, all managed through your BMG dashboard.

How It Works

Social media assessment: We audit your Facebook presence and give you recommendations to improve visibility.

Campaign setup: Account creation, dashboard setup, establishing tone of voice, products or services to feature, and brand persona based on your initial questionnaire.

Content plan: Writing ad copy, getting your approval, working out the content roadmap.

Daily monitoring: Your account is monitored daily to maximize results.

Performance insights: Weekly and monthly reports sent directly to you, showing the work done and results achieved.

Key Features

Customizable dashboard: Track campaign progress with your own branded dashboard. White-label email notifications go out via your company email address.

Post everywhere from one place: Publish and schedule posts for Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, or Instagram from a single dashboard. Intelligent algorithms detect the best day and time to post based on previous engagement.

Engage your followers: Respond to customers, share ready-to-post content, build stronger social relationships.

Generate leads via Twitter: Discover new leads on Twitter and engage them with the click of a button.

Complete transparency: The dashboard shows exactly where your dollars are going. Every task performed is reported in real-time.

Ad spend: Up to $2,000/month in ad spend included.

No setup fees, cancel anytime: Straightforward pricing with no hidden costs.

service_tiers.excerpt: We set up and manage your Facebook campaigns, deliver 15 ad copies and 10 posts monthly, run A/B tests to sharpen performance, and give you full dashboard access. No setup fees.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is full-service Facebook advertising. I handle campaign setup, write your ad copy, manage your spend (up to $10,000/month), and optimize as we go. You get 15 ad copies and 10 posts every month, weekly reports, and access to your BMG dashboard to track every move.

Social Media Assessment
I audit your current Facebook presence and give you initial recommendations to improve visibility.

Campaign Setup
We create your account in the dashboard, set the tone of voice, define your brand persona, and map out which products or services to highlight. This is all based on an initial questionnaire.

Content Plan
I write the ad copies, get your approval, and work out a content roadmap so everything runs on schedule.

Daily Monitoring
Your account gets monitored daily to maximize results. If something needs adjustment, we catch it fast.

Performance Insights
You get weekly and monthly reports showing exactly what we did and what it delivered.

Key Features

Custom Dashboard
Track every task, every post, every result. The dashboard is branded as yours, and all notifications come from your email address.

Post From One Place
Publish and schedule posts for Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, or Instagram from a single dashboard. Our system detects the best day and time to post based on your previous engagement.

Engage Your Followers
Respond to comments, share ready-to-post content, and build stronger relationships with your audience. All from the dashboard.

Twitter Lead Generation
Find new leads on Twitter by setting up searches for keywords related to your business. When someone in your area talks about what you do, you can engage with one click.

Complete Transparency
Every task performed is reported in real time. You see exactly where your dollars are going and what they’re producing.

Campaign Monitoring
We monitor every campaign to identify areas for improvement. Automated weekly and monthly updates keep you informed and ensure your goals are being met.

  • Access to your BMG social media dashboard
  • Campaign setup and management on Facebook
  • 15 ad copies per month
  • 10 posts per month
  • Ad spend up to $10,000/month
  • A/B testing and optimization
  • Weekly reports
  • Monthly performance reports
  • Call, chat, and email support

service_tiers.title: Facebook Ads Standard Plan
service_tiers.excerpt: Run Facebook campaigns that put your business in front of the right people. We handle setup, ad creation, publishing, and A/B testing so you can focus on closing deals.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is Facebook advertising without the guesswork. I set up your campaigns, write your ad copy, and publish fresh content every month. You get 10 ad variations to test and 8 posts to keep your audience engaged. Everything runs through your BMG dashboard so you see exactly what’s happening.

How It Works

Profile Audit: First, I look at your current Facebook presence and tell you what needs fixing.

Campaign Setup: We establish your brand voice, the products or services you want to promote, and the audience you’re after. All based on a short questionnaire.

Content Roadmap: I write the ad copy, you approve it, and we map out the publishing schedule.

Daily Monitoring: Your account gets checked every day to catch opportunities and fix problems fast.

Weekly & Monthly Reports: You get performance updates sent to your dashboard automatically. No chasing me down for numbers.

Key Features

Dashboard You Can Brand: The client portal carries your logo and sends notifications from your email address. White-label all the way.

Post to Multiple Platforms: Schedule Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and Instagram posts from one place. Our system detects the best times to publish based on past engagement.

Follower Engagement: Respond to comments and messages directly from the dashboard.

Twitter Lead Generation: Set up keyword searches to find people talking about what you sell. Engage them with one click.

Real-Time Task Reporting: Every ad we write, every post we publish, every adjustment we make shows up in your dashboard the moment it’s done.

Campaign Monitoring: We watch performance daily and send automated updates weekly and monthly.

Ad Spend Up To $4,000/Month: This plan supports campaigns with budgets up to four thousand per month.

What Social Media Advertising Actually Does

It puts your product or service in front of people actively using Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, or Instagram. We create content, text, graphics, video, polls, whatever fits, and target it to the right audience.

This is not a guaranteed sales machine. Nobody can control what a potential customer decides once they see your ad. What we can do is target the right people at the right time and give them a reason to engage. The rest is up to them.

Who This Is For

Businesses that want to show up on social networks where their customers already spend time. If you’re not posting regularly or you’re guessing at what to say, this fixes that.

Tracking Performance

Your dashboard shows growth across all connected profiles. You can see changes in reach, followers, and engagement for Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and Instagram in one place. Weekly and monthly reports break down what’s working and what needs adjustment.

Post Approval

You review all posts before they go live. Request revisions before the publishing cycle starts. Posts approved after their scheduled date may not get published that cycle.

service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This plan is for Boise businesses ready to run paid Instagram ads without the overhead of managing them yourself. I handle campaign setup, banner creation, daily monitoring, and weekly reporting. You get 12 new ad banners each month, ad spend management up to $1,000/month, and access to your BMG dashboard where you can track every action in real time.

How It Works

Social Media Assessment
I audit your Instagram profile and give you initial recommendations to improve visibility and ad readiness.

Campaign Setup
Account creation, dashboard setup, and establishing the tone of voice, products or services to promote, and brand persona. This is based on an initial questionnaire.

Content Plan
I write ad copy, get your approval, and map out the content roadmap for the month.

Daily Monitoring
Your account is monitored daily to maximize results and catch any issues early.

Performance Insights
Weekly and monthly reports keep you informed about what’s been done and what’s working.

Key Features

Custom Dashboard
Track campaign progress in your BMG-branded dashboard. All notifications come from your own email address if you’re white-labeling this for a client.

Post Everywhere from One Place
The dashboard lets you publish and schedule posts across Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and Instagram from a single interface. Smart algorithms detect the best day and time to post based on past engagement.

Engage Your Followers
Respond to customers, share ready-to-post content, and build stronger social relationships, all from the dashboard.

Twitter Lead Generation
Discover new leads on Twitter and engage them with one click. Set up keyword searches related to your business and watch leads roll in.

No Setup Fees, Cancel Anytime
No long-term contracts. No account setup fees. If it’s not working for you, cancel without penalty.

Complete Transparency
Every task I perform is logged in real time. You see exactly where your dollars are going and what’s being done.

Cross-Platform Performance Tracking
Monitor growth across Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and Instagram from one dashboard. See reach, fans, followers, and engagement metrics in one place.

Add-Ons Available

  • Call Tracking (Local Number): $19/month
  • Call Tracking (Toll-Free Number): $25/month

service_tiers.title: LinkedIn Ads - Basic Plan
service_tiers.excerpt: Run professional LinkedIn ad campaigns that connect you with the right audience. Four ad copies, four posts per month, A/B testing, and full dashboard access. No setup fees. Cancel anytime.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is a managed LinkedIn advertising campaign. You work directly with me. The team handles execution.

Every month you get four ad copies and four organic posts. We test variations to see what performs. You track everything in your BMG dashboard, every ad, every post, every result.

We handle the entire process: account setup, ad creation, budget management (up to $2,000/month in ad spend), daily monitoring, and weekly reports. You focus on your business. We run the campaigns.

How It Works

Social media assessment: We audit your LinkedIn presence and make initial recommendations.

Account setup: We create your campaign structure in the dashboard. We establish tone, messaging, and brand voice based on your business.

Content planning: We write the ad copy and posts, get your approval, and map out the content calendar.

Daily monitoring: Your account is monitored every day to maximize results.

Performance reporting: Weekly and monthly reports show what’s working and what’s not.

Dashboard Features

Your BMG dashboard gives you a single place to manage everything. You can publish and schedule posts across multiple platforms (LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter, Instagram) from one screen. The system detects the best times to post based on past engagement.

You can respond to followers, track leads, and see every action we take, real-time transparency into where your budget goes.

LinkedIn Lead Generation

We use LinkedIn’s targeting to find people talking about your services in your area. Set up keyword searches related to your business and track the leads.

The dashboard shows growth across all channels. You can monitor changes in reach, engagement, and follower count over time.

What’s Included

  • Access to BMG social media dashboard
  • Campaign setup and management on LinkedIn
  • 4 ad copies per month
  • 4 organic posts per month
  • Ad spend management up to $2,000/month
  • Weekly reports
  • Monthly performance reports
  • Email and chat support
  • No setup fees
  • Cancel anytime

Reasonable Pricing

No setup fees. No long-term contract. You can cancel anytime. The dashboard shows exactly where your dollars go.

service_tiers.title: LinkedIn Ads Standard Plan
service_tiers.excerpt: Launch LinkedIn ads that connect you with the right business audience. We handle campaign setup, craft 10 ad copies monthly, publish 8 posts, and run A/B tests to maximize performance. You get access to your BMG dashboard with weekly and monthly reporting. No setup fees, cancel anytime.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You’re Getting

This is a full-service LinkedIn advertising package. I set up the campaign, write the ads, publish posts, test what works, and adjust as we go. The goal is simple: put your business in front of the decision-makers who need what you offer.

Here’s what happens:

Month 1

We audit your current LinkedIn presence and set up the campaign from scratch. I establish your brand voice, identify your target audience, and get the first round of ads live. You’ll see everything tracked in your BMG dashboard.

Ongoing

Every month, you get 10 new ad copies and 8 posts. We run A/B tests to figure out what resonates with your audience. I monitor the account daily, optimize bids, and adjust targeting based on performance. You get weekly check-ins and monthly performance reports.

The Dashboard

You’ll have full access to your BMG dashboard where every task, post, and result is logged in real time. No guessing what’s happening with your ad spend. You see it all.

What’s Included

  • Campaign setup and ongoing management on LinkedIn
  • 10 ad copies per month (text and image)
  • 8 posts per month
  • Ad spend management up to $4,000/month
  • A/B testing on ad creative and targeting
  • Daily account monitoring
  • Weekly progress reports
  • Monthly performance reports
  • Call, chat, and email support
  • Access to your BMG dashboard

How It Works

Social Media Assessment I audit your LinkedIn profile and give you recommendations to improve visibility before we launch anything.

Campaign Setup We establish your brand persona, tone of voice, and targeting parameters based on your answers to an initial questionnaire. Everything gets set up in the dashboard.

Content Plan I write the ad copies and posts, send them to you for approval, and map out the content roadmap for the month.

Daily Monitoring Your account is monitored every day to catch issues early and capitalize on what’s working.

Performance Insights You get weekly updates and monthly reports showing what we did and what results we’re seeing.

Key Features

Custom Dashboard Track campaign progress in your branded BMG dashboard. Schedule posts, review performance, and see every task completed. Email notifications come from your branded account, not ours.

Post from One Place The dashboard lets you publish and schedule posts across LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram from a single interface. Our system detects the best times to post based on past engagement.

Engage Your Followers Respond to comments, share content, and build stronger relationships with your audience, all from the dashboard.

Twitter Lead Generation Find new leads on Twitter by searching for keywords related to your business. Engage them directly from the dashboard.

No Setup Fees You pay monthly, cancel anytime. No hidden charges.

Complete Transparency Every task performed is reported in real time. You see exactly where your dollars are going and what’s being done.

Campaign Monitoring We monitor every campaign to identify areas of improvement and provide automated weekly and monthly updates to ensure your goals are being met.

service_tiers.excerpt: Keep your social profiles active with organic posts while running Facebook ad campaigns that actually generate leads. 100 posts per month, 30 ad copies, full A/B testing, no setup fees, cancel anytime.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

Organic posting keeps your brand visible. Paid ads bring in leads. This package does both.

You get 100 posts per month published on Facebook and Instagram, content that keeps your audience engaged and your brand top-of-mind. On the paid side, we run Facebook ad campaigns with 30 ad copies per month, A/B tested to find what works. Ad spend up to $20,000/month supported.

Everything runs through your BMG dashboard. You see every post before it goes live, you track every ad, and you get weekly and monthly performance reports. No setup fees. No long-term contract.

How It Works

Setup: We create accounts on the dashboard, establish your tone of voice, define what products or services to talk about, and lock in your brand persona based on a quick questionnaire.

Account monitoring: Your profiles get checked daily for comments and messages.

Performance insights: Weekly and monthly reports go out automatically so you always know what’s been done and what results we’re seeing.

Key Features

Twitter lead generation: Find new leads on Twitter and engage them with one click.

Complete transparency: Every task performed is reported in real-time on your dashboard. You see exactly where your dollars are going.

service_tiers.title: Premium Social Media Management
service_tiers.excerpt: 48 posts per month across Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and Instagram. Professional content creation, daily account monitoring, and weekly performance reports. Your dashboard shows every task we complete.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is full-service social media management for businesses that need consistent visibility across four major platforms: Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and Instagram.

Every month, we create and schedule 48 posts (24 business-focused, 24 engagement-focused) tailored to your brand. We monitor your accounts daily for comments and messages. You get weekly status updates and a full monthly performance report.

You work directly with me. Behind me is a team that handles execution at scale. The dashboard shows every post, every report, every task completed on your account. No setup fees. Cancel anytime.

How It Works

Social Media Assessment - We audit your current profiles (cover images, bios, contact info, hashtags) and map out what needs improvement.

Content Plan - We write the posts, get your approval, and schedule them across the month. You review everything before it goes live.

Daily Monitoring - Your profiles are checked every day for comments, messages, and engagement opportunities.

Performance Tracking - Weekly and monthly reports show exactly what we posted, when, and how it performed. All visible in your dashboard.

What’s Included

  • Access to your BMG social media dashboard (branded for your business)
  • 48 posts per month (24 business posts, 24 generic engagement posts)
  • Posting and scheduling across Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and Instagram
  • Daily account monitoring
  • Weekly status reports
  • Monthly performance reports
  • Professional support via email, chat, and phone

Key Features

Post Everywhere From One Place - Schedule content for all four platforms from a single dashboard. Our system detects the best times to post based on past engagement.

Engage Your Followers - Simple tools to respond to customers, share content, and build stronger social relationships.

Twitter Lead Generation - Set up searches for keywords related to your business. Find customers talking about what you do, in your area.

Complete Transparency - The dashboard shows every task performed in real time. You see where your money goes.

No Setup Fees, Cancel Anytime - No long-term contract. Cancel if it’s not working for you.

service_tiers.title: Guaranteed Social Boost
service_tiers.excerpt: Ten posts a month across two platforms. Guaranteed follower and engagement growth. Cancel anytime.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is straightforward social media management with a growth guarantee built in.

I’ll post ten times a month across two platforms of your choice. Mix of business content, motivational posts, and video. You’ll see up to 1,000 new likes and followers over the term.

No setup fee. No contract. Cancel whenever.

What’s Included

  • 10 posts per month: consistent posting schedule
  • 4 motivational posts: facts, trivia, humor, fill-in-the-blank, short videos
  • 4 business posts: product highlights, service updates, customer stories
  • 2 video posts: short-form video content for engagement
  • 2 social platforms: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, or Twitter (your choice)
  • Guaranteed growth: up to 1,000 new likes and followers
  • Weekly + monthly reporting: see what’s working
  • Email, chat, phone support: reach me however works for you

How It Works

You pick the two platforms. I handle the posting. The content mixes business messaging with engagement-focused material that gets shares and follows.

The guarantee means you’re not guessing whether this will move the needle. We track follower count and engagement from day one. If we’re not hitting the mark, we adjust the content strategy until we do.

Reports land weekly (quick check-in on performance) and monthly (full breakdown of what worked).

No long-term commitment. You can cancel anytime if it’s not delivering.

  • 10 posts per month: consistent posting schedule
  • 4 motivational posts: facts, trivia, humor, fill-in-the-blank, short videos

  • 2 social platforms: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, or Twitter (your choice)
  • Guaranteed growth: up to 1,000 new likes and followers
  • Weekly + monthly reporting: see what’s working
  • Email, chat, phone support: reach me however works for you

How It Works

You pick the two platforms. I handle the posting. The content mixes business messaging with engagement-focused material that gets shares and follows.

The guarantee means you’re not guessing whether this will move the needle. We track follower count and engagement from day one. If we’re not hitting the mark, we adjust the content strategy until we do.

Reports land weekly (quick check-in on performance) and monthly (full breakdown of what worked).

No long-term commitment. You can cancel anytime if it’s not delivering.
