service_tiers.title: Solo Plan, Social Media Management
service_tiers.excerpt: Pick one platform. We handle everything else. 12 monthly posts on Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, or Instagram, content written, scheduled, posted. You get the dashboard, weekly reports, no setup fees, cancel anytime.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

You pick one platform, Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, or Instagram. We post 12 times a month. Half business content (your services, offers, local angle), half generic engagement posts (quotes, tips, humor). We write it, schedule it, post it.

You see everything on your dashboard. We monitor comments and messages daily. Weekly status reports, monthly performance summaries. No setup fees. Cancel whenever.

How It Works

Month 1: We audit your profile, clean up the basics (bio, cover image, URL, contact info), write your first 12 posts, schedule them. You approve before anything goes live.

Month 2+: 12 new posts every month. We track what’s working, adjust the mix. Reports keep coming.

The dashboard shows every post, every action, every result. You’re never wondering what we did or when.

Why One Platform

Most Boise businesses don’t need to be everywhere. They need to show up consistently somewhere. One platform, done right, beats four platforms done poorly. Pick the one your customers actually use. We’ll make it count.

If you want to add a second platform later, we have bigger plans for that. Start here.

What’s Included

  • Platform choice: Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, or Instagram
  • 12 posts/month: 6 business posts, 6 generic engagement posts
  • Daily monitoring: We check comments and messages
  • Weekly reports: What we posted, how it performed
  • Monthly summaries: Big-picture performance
  • Dashboard access: See everything in real time
  • No setup fees, cancel anytime

service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is social media management for businesses that want consistent engagement without hiring a full-time social person. You pick three platforms, Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, or Instagram, and we post, monitor, and report on all of them.

36 posts per month. Split between content about your business and general industry stuff that keeps your feed interesting. We schedule everything, watch for comments and messages daily, and send you weekly updates so you always know what’s happening.

You get access to your dashboard. It shows every post, every task, every metric in real time. No surprises. No wondering what you’re paying for.

How It Works

Social media assessment: We look at your current profiles and tell you what needs fixing. Profile images, bios, contact info, hashtags, the basics that make you look legit.

Content plan: We write the posts, you approve them, we schedule them. You’re not doing the work, but you’re never blind to what’s going out.

Daily monitoring: Your profiles get checked every day. Comments, messages, mentions, we’re on it.

Performance insights: Weekly status reports and monthly performance reports go out automatically. You know what’s working and what’s not.

What Makes This Different

Post from one place. Our dashboard lets you see all three platforms at once. You’re not logging into Facebook, then Twitter, then LinkedIn separately. It’s all there.

Engage without the busywork. Respond to followers, share content, build relationships without living on social media all day.

Twitter lead generation tool. Set up searches for keywords related to your business. When someone tweets about needing what you offer, you see it. That’s a lead you wouldn’t have found otherwise.

No setup fees. Cancel anytime. You’re not locked in. The service works or it doesn’t.

Reporting You Can Actually Use

The dashboard shows every post, every reply, every metric. Your customers can log in and see exactly what we’re doing. Weekly and monthly reports go out automatically, no waiting around for someone to compile a PDF.

You can track performance across all three platforms from one screen. Follower growth, reach, engagement, it’s all visible.

service_tiers.title: Guaranteed Social Boost
service_tiers.excerpt: Ten posts a month across two platforms. Guaranteed growth up to 1,000 new likes and followers. No setup fees, cancel anytime.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is a straightforward social boost package. I post for you, manage two platforms, and guarantee you’ll see real follower growth.

Here’s what happens: I create and publish 10 posts per month across your two most important social channels. Four motivational posts (facts, quotes, humor, short videos), four business posts (your services, your work, your offers), and two video posts. Every week you get a report showing what went live. Every month you get a full breakdown of growth and engagement.

The guarantee: up to 1,000 new likes and followers across your profiles. That’s real audience growth, not fake accounts. If you’re starting from zero or stuck in the low hundreds, this moves the needle.

Who This Works For

Small businesses that need a consistent social presence but don’t have time to post daily. Shops, service providers, local retailers. You know you should be on social, but every week slips by and you post nothing. This fixes that.

You get content that represents your business, posted on schedule, with guaranteed audience growth baked in. No setup fees. Cancel anytime if it’s not working.

How It Works

You pick two platforms (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, wherever your customers are). I build a content calendar, create the posts, and publish them on schedule. You approve or adjust anything you want before it goes live.

Reports come weekly (what posted, what performed) and monthly (full growth summary). You have direct access to me via email, chat, or phone if you need changes or have questions.

The follower/like guarantee kicks in from day one. By the end of the month, you’ll see measurable audience growth. If you don’t, I keep working until you do.
service_tiers.content_html:
What You Get

This is a straightforward social boost package. I post for you, manage two platforms, and guarantee you’ll see real follower growth.

Here’s what happens: I create and publish 10 posts per month across your two most important social channels. Four motivational posts (facts, quotes, humor, short videos), four business posts (your services, your work, your offers), and two video posts. Every week you get a report showing what went live. Every month you get a full breakdown of growth and engagement.

The guarantee: up to 1,000 new likes and followers across your profiles. That’s real audience growth, not fake accounts. If you’re starting from zero or stuck in the low hundreds, this moves the needle.

Who This Works For

Small businesses that need a consistent social presence but don’t have time to post daily. Shops, service providers, local retailers. You know you should be on social, but every week slips by and you post nothing. This fixes that.

You get content that represents your business, posted on schedule, with guaranteed audience growth baked in. No setup fees. Cancel anytime if it’s not working.

How It Works

You pick two platforms (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, wherever your customers are). I build a content calendar, create the posts, and publish them on schedule. You approve or adjust anything you want before it goes live.

Reports come weekly (what posted, what performed) and monthly (full growth summary). You have direct access to me via email, chat, or phone if you need changes or have questions.

The follower/like guarantee kicks in from day one. By the end of the month, you’ll see measurable audience growth. If you don’t, I keep working until you do.

service_tiers.title: Trinity Marketing Plan
service_tiers.excerpt: Full-spectrum digital marketing for businesses that want more traffic, more visibility, and more leads. SEO, Google Ads, and social media management, all working together, all done for you.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You’re Getting

The Trinity Plan is for Boise businesses that want the whole package: organic SEO, paid search advertising, and active social media presence.

Here’s what that means in practice:

SEO Work
We focus on 1 keyword topic, a core service, product line, or market niche, and track 25 keywords around that topic. You get 5 primary target keywords. These are the search terms we’re actively optimizing your site for.

Google Ads
We run paid search campaigns in Google’s Search Network. Basic conversion tracking is included so we know what’s working. You get weekly PPC reports and a monthly performance summary.

Social Media Management
Pick 3 platforms: Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, or Instagram. We set up and manage the accounts. You get 12 posts per month (3 per platform), plus weekly status reports and monthly performance summaries. You’ll have access to your social media dashboard where you can see everything in real time.

How It Works

Site Assessment
We audit your website and online presence. We figure out who you’re trying to reach and what you’re trying to accomplish.

Keyword Research
We build out a keyword strategy and run it by you before we start. Nothing gets optimized until you sign off on the targets.

Reporting
Weekly and monthly automated reports for PPC and social. You know what’s happening, what we’re spending, what’s converting.

You work directly with me. The team handles execution.

service_tiers.title: AI Brand Visibility Dashboard
service_tiers.excerpt: See how your business shows up when people ask ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google's AI, Gemini, or Claude about services in your space. Real-time tracking of your brand mentions, keyword positioning, and visibility across AI-generated answers.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What This Is

This is a dashboard that shows you how your brand appears across major AI platforms - ChatGPT, Google AI, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude.

When someone asks an AI tool “who does [your service] in Boise?” or “best [your category] near me?”, does your business come up? This dashboard tells you.

You get:

  • AI Keyword Tracking - We track the keywords these platforms are most likely to recognize and surface in their responses. See which terms trigger mentions of your business.
  • Local Targeting - Focus on specific cities, regions, or service areas relevant to you. We measure how you show up for local queries in AI-driven results.
  • AI Search Ranking Insights - See how your target keywords perform across AI-generated answers. Understand where you’re visible and where you’re missing.
  • Brand Visibility Tracking - Monitor how often your brand name appears in AI-powered search results and conversational responses. Track your AI presence over time.

This isn’t traditional SEO. It’s visibility in the new world of AI-driven search.

Why It Matters Now

People are shifting from Google to AI tools for recommendations. If you’re not showing up when someone asks Claude or ChatGPT for a local provider, you’re invisible to that customer.

This dashboard gives you the data. You see what’s working, what’s not, and where the gaps are.

service_tiers.title: AI Foundation
service_tiers.excerpt: Track how your brand shows up in AI search results. We monitor 5 targeted prompts across ChatGPT, Google AI Mode, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude for one key service area.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You’re Getting

AI search is how people find businesses now. When someone asks ChatGPT or Perplexity for a recommendation in your industry, does your business come up?

This tracks that. We monitor 5 specific prompts related to your service area across the major AI platforms. You’ll see exactly where you show up, where you don’t, and what those tools are saying about your business.

The Details

5 Targeted Prompts: We write prompts that match how people actually search for your type of business in AI tools. Things like “best plumber in Boise” or “who should I hire for kitchen remodeling near me”.

1 Service Area: Pick your primary service category. We focus the tracking there.

5 AI Platforms: ChatGPT, Google AI Mode, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude. These are the tools people use to get recommendations.

You get a report showing visibility across all five platforms. Not a ranking score, just the raw data: did you show up, what context, what position.

service_tiers.content_raw:
What You’re Getting

We track your brand visibility across the AI platforms people actually use to find services like yours. Not traditional search engines. AI assistants.

Every month, we monitor 15 specific search prompts across two of your key service areas. The platforms we track:

  • ChatGPT
  • Google AI Mode
  • Perplexity
  • Gemini
  • Claude

You get a clear picture of whether your business comes up when potential customers ask AI tools for recommendations in your categories. If you’re not showing up, you know where the gap is. If you are, you know what’s working.

This isn’t about manipulating AI results. It’s about visibility tracking so you can make informed decisions about your overall marketing and content strategy.

service_tiers.content_raw:
What You’re Getting

AI search is changing how people find businesses. Someone asks ChatGPT “best plumber in Boise” or “who does kitchen remodeling near me”, and the AI either mentions your business or it doesn’t.

We track that.

You pick one core service area. We write 10 prompts around it, the questions your customers are actually asking AI tools. Then we run those prompts regularly across five major platforms: ChatGPT, Google AI Mode, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude.

You get visibility reporting. Where you show up. Where you don’t. How often your brand gets mentioned when people ask AI for help.

This isn’t optimization yet. It’s intelligence. You can’t improve what you’re not measuring.

What’s Included

  • 10 AI search prompts: targeted to one service area
  • 5 AI platforms monitored: ChatGPT, Google AI Mode, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude
  • Regular tracking: we run the prompts on a recurring schedule
  • Visibility reporting: see where your brand appears (or doesn’t) in AI responses

This works for any local service business. You tell us the service area that matters most. We handle the rest.

service_tiers.title: Heatmap Subscription
service_tiers.excerpt: See exactly where your visitors click, scroll, and lose interest. We install heatmap tracking on your site so you can make layout and content decisions based on real user behavior, not guesswork.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

We set up heatmap tracking on your website. You get three views of visitor behavior: scrollmaps show how far down the page people scroll before leaving, click overlays show which buttons and links get the most action, and confetti view breaks clicks down by traffic source (organic, referral, paid, etc.).

You’ll see where people hunt for information and where they give up. That tells you where to move CTAs, trim dead sections, or add content that holds attention. You access everything through your BMG dashboard.

Scrollmap

Shows how far down each page visitors scroll before they bounce. You’ll know exactly which fold to place offers above and where attention drops off. If 80% of visitors never make it past the second section, you know that section needs work or the important stuff needs to move up.

Click Overlay Report

Every clickable element on your page gets a click count. Buttons, links, images, anything. You’ll see which CTAs perform and which get ignored. If your main signup button gets 12 clicks and a random footer link gets 200, your layout is fighting you.

Confetti View

Breaks down every click by where the visitor came from. You can filter by referral source, search term, campaign, whatever. Lets you see if paid traffic behaves differently than organic, or if mobile users click different spots than desktop.

Why This Matters

Most site decisions are based on what the owner thinks makes sense. Heatmaps show what actually happens. You’ll stop guessing about layout, content priority, and CTA placement. You’ll have data.

service_tiers.title: User Testing Video
service_tiers.excerpt: See your website through your customers' eyes. Real users record their experience navigating your site so you can fix what's broken and keep what works.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

I’ll get real people to test your website and record what they say out loud while they do it. You watch the video, see where they get confused, see what makes them leave. It’s the fastest way to find problems you didn’t know existed.

Why This Matters

You can stare at your own site for hours and never see what a first-time visitor sees. They decide in 30 seconds if they’re staying or leaving. This shows you exactly what happens in those 30 seconds.

Real Users, Real Feedback

These are average people from the U.S. They’re not web designers or marketers. They’re your actual audience. They’ll record their screen and talk through what they’re thinking as they click around. You get the raw footage. No editing, no spin.

What You’ll Learn

First Impressions: Does your homepage make sense? Do people understand what you do in the first 10 seconds? If they’re bouncing, you’ll see why.

Usability Problems: Can people find what they’re looking for? Do your forms work? Is your checkout confusing? You’ll watch them try to complete a task and see exactly where they get stuck.

Conversion Blockers: If traffic is good but sales aren’t, this will show you what’s killing the deal. Maybe the button isn’t obvious. Maybe the pricing page raises more questions than it answers. You’ll see it happen in real time.

This is a one-time test. You order it, I set it up, you get the video within a few days. Then you decide what to fix.

service_tiers.title: Social Media Audit Report
service_tiers.excerpt: Get a clear picture of where your social accounts stand. We'll audit Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram across 30 different checkpoints and tell you exactly what's working, what isn't, and what to fix next.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is a 30-point audit of three social profiles: Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram. You get a written report that breaks down what’s happening on each platform.

I look at profile completeness, posting patterns, engagement rates, content quality, audience behavior, and technical setup. Then I tell you what needs attention.

Why Run an Audit

Most businesses post blindly. They don’t know if their profile bios are optimized, if their posting schedule makes sense, or if they’re even talking to the right audience.

An audit gives you the baseline. It shows gaps you didn’t know existed and opportunities you’re not using. You can’t improve what you don’t measure.

What I’m Looking For

  • Profile setup issues (missing info, broken links, outdated branding)
  • Content performance (what posts get traction, what dies)
  • Audience insights (who’s actually following you, who’s engaging)
  • Technical optimization (profile SEO, platform-specific features you’re ignoring)
  • Competitive context (how you stack up against similar businesses in your space)

You’ll get a prioritized list of fixes. High-impact stuff first, easy wins highlighted, long-term strategy recommendations at the end.

This is a one-time deliverable. You get the report, you decide what to act on. If you want help executing the fixes, we can talk about ongoing management after.

service_tiers.title: Sales Audits
service_tiers.excerpt: A 32-point website audit that shows what's working, what's broken, and what can be improved. You get a clear picture of on-site issues, local visibility gaps, and competitive positioning.
service_tiers.content_raw:
What You Get

This is a comprehensive website audit I run to identify technical issues, local visibility problems, and competitive gaps. It covers 32 data points across your site and online presence.

You get a detailed report showing:

  • What’s working well on your site
  • What’s broken or holding you back
  • Where you stand against local competitors
  • Specific fixes to improve visibility

The audit looks at on-site SEO fundamentals (titles, meta descriptions, header tags, site speed, mobile usability), local search presence (Google Business Profile setup, citation consistency, local pack rankings), and how you compare to businesses ranking above you.

This is the same audit I use when evaluating new client sites. It’s concrete, actionable, and built for business owners who need to know what to fix first.

Who This Is For

Boise-area businesses that want a clear assessment before committing to ongoing work. You might be comparing marketing options, trying to understand why your site isn’t ranking, or just want an outside technical review.

This works for local service businesses, retail, professional services, or any business that depends on being found online in the Treasure Valley.

What Makes This Useful

No fluff. The report is structured to show you exactly what’s broken and what it costs you in terms of visibility. You get priority-ranked recommendations so you know what to tackle first.

I compare your site against the businesses ranking above you in local search. That competitive analysis shows you the specific gaps (content depth, backlink profile, technical setup) that explain the ranking difference.

The audit is designed to be understood by non-technical business owners. You don’t need to know what schema markup is to understand why it matters and what happens when you add it.
